programme.desc: County Seat War : The military is pulling out of Fort Dodge leaving the civilians there with no future.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Caught by a Whisker : Two brothers decide to rob the Dodge City State National Bank. However, a new alarm bell in the bank and a wise Earp expecting them pose problems for the men getting away.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Mysterious Cowhand : After Earp's cousin is killed with a knife, Earp decides to go alone to Texas disguised as a cowhand to find the killer.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Cattle Thieves : Earp and Judge Tobin are forced to enforce a rustling law they think is too strict.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Remittance Man : Jonathan Milton is an outcast from England living in Dodge City on a inherited remittance who gets into trouble with a gambler.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: King of the Frontier : Ned Buntline arrives in Dodge City after writing a book about Earp. The book says Earp can beat any cowboy so a rancher bets Buntline that Earp can't beat his men.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Plague Carrier : Earp and Dr. McCarty urge a doctor to open a practice in Dodge City but when smallpox breaks out they learn he isn't licensed.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Kill the Editor : A new editor is brought in to take over the Globe Times newspaper which has been under attack in Dodge City.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Little Brother : The stage Morgan Earp is riding on is held up. Morgan recognizes one of the bandits Smiley Dunlap as a friend of Doc Holliday.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Trail : The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: John Gotti: Convicted : John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Lost Boys : In June of 1997, a crime wave swept Iowa like a tornado. It left a trail of robbery, kidnapping, and murder in its wake, and then it moved on. No one knew where.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Brotherhood of Hate : In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Under Fire : A series of armored car heists and bloody shoot-outs shocked law enforcement. The brutal violence of the crimes suggested a motive more complex than greed. When the robbers started targeting police, the FBI took charge.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Takeover : Two armed bank robbers hit a Seattle bank taking over 150,000 dollars. Before they can escape police confront them and the pair splits up. As authorities search block by block they learn one was a career criminal with a long history of violence.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Mission : When a family was murdered in Arkansas, it seemed like an isolated event. But soon the crime was revealed to be part of an ever-widening circle of violence that defined a new age of domestic terrorism.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Small Town Terror : In a small Ohio community, an elderly woman and a teenaged boy disappeared. Because they vanished within hours of each other, police believed the cases were linked. But they didn't know how.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Family Secrets : A woman and her infant son vanish. The husband is frantic. The clues are scarce, but hopes linger, even as the hours and days tick by without a word. Was she on the run, or the victim of foul play?

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: When Seconds Count : On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Moving Target : When a sniper in Utah started targeting African-American men for death, authorities launched a massive investigation. With scant clues and no witnesses they found the odds stacked against them, and they had no idea where the killer would strike next.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The Initiation : When gangs go to war, they don't care who gets in the way. In 1988 an innocent man was gunned down near Cleveland, Ohio, a victim of a deadly initiation.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The Perfect Heist : Bank robbery is a brazen yet simple crime. A mask, a gun, a note passed to a teller. But bank burglary is different. It takes skill to disable an alarm, to penetrate a locked vault.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Voice of Terror : In the late 1970s, the FBI had a working knowledge of anti-Castro terrorists operating in the United States. But then a new group appeared, more violent and aggressive than their predecessors.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing : Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lethal Encounter : In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger, the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Wasted Youth : When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxic Death : Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Trial Of The Century : Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Coroner's Casebook : A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Murder For Hire : For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Military Justice : The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tools Of Death : Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: False Witness : When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: Stolen Youths : A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To Kill Again : Some people do get away with murder at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Broken Vows : When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fatal Compulsion : Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker  the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Anywhere I Lay My Head : Things are going great for Sean and Ellie, Degrassi’s most unlikely couple—so well that Sean asks Ellie to move in. Despite their closeness, Ellie hesitates and Sean doesn’t understand why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Islands In the Stream : In her quest to repay Spinner for damage to his car, Alpha Paige has gone all beta. Suddenly, Spin’s using his new-found powers to zap whatever self-confidence Paige has left.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Time Stands Still, Pt.1 : Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Time Stands Still, Pt.2 : Rick returns to Degrassi after the “Whack Your Brain” debacle at the hands of Spinner, Jay, and Alex. Toby and Mr. Raditch try to convince him to take the afternoon off, to go home and cool off, but an oddly calm Rick chooses to stay.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Back In Black : After the shooting at Degrassi, the full school board counseling response team moves in. And so does the media. Local reporter, Rachel Roberts, has decided to make Sean the hero of her piece.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Neutron Dance : Craig has a problem – the recording deal he and his band won last year is about to expire, but “Downtown Sasquatch” is nowhere near ready to record. With Jimmy in the hospital, they’re missing a key member.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Voices Carry, Pt.1 : Craig’s back with Ashley and he’s determined not to screw it up this time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Voices Carry, Pt.2 : Distraught when Ashley refuses his proposal, Craig falls into a major rage, completely trashing his hotel room.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Bark At The Moon : Degrassi has a new hottie in Grade 9 and Manny’s got her eye on him. Especially since her “boyfriend” Spinner can’t even be bothered to take a night off work to come to the Cupid Dance she’s organized.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Secret, Pt. 1 : Something’s wrong with Emma. Though she’s frustrated at being treated with kid gloves by everyone since the school shooting, she’s not sure how she’d rather be treated. So she just keeps going on, numbly reassuring everyone that she’s fine.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Secret, Pt. 2 : Emma steps into the lead role in Dracula, but her recent extra-curricular activities with Jay prove even more dramatic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Eye Of The Tiger : Spinner has difficulty dealing with the return of injured Jimmy. He hasn’t talked to him since the shooting, and his guilt over what he did leaves him unable to welcome Jimmy back to school.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Queen Of Hearts : Ellie is finding it hard to make ends meet now that she’s living on her own and hates relying on her mother for rent, especially with its obligatory dinners to pick up the cheque.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Modern Love (aka Love Will Tear Us Apart) : Paige and Matt are totally in love, so what if they have to keep it secret? It’s worth all the extra effort.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Moonlight Desires : With school coming to a close, Marco is making huge plans for his summer with Dylan – and their future. He’s considering fast-tracking to graduate high school, joining Dylan in university a year earlier.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: West End Girls : After dutifully picking up the Spirit Squad slack for a love-struck Paige all year, Manny feels betrayed when Paige claims all the glory. So Manny plots her revenge with a complicated cheer that leaves Paige with a broken leg on Prom Night.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Goin' Down The Road, Pt. 1 (aka All Cried Out, Pt.1) : Ashley’s leaving for the summer, and the idea of their temporary farewell and the stress of writing a song for Kevin Smith’s movie -- is making him, well, nuts. So Craig decides to do whatever it takes to follow her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Goin' Down The Road, Pt. 2 (aka All Cried Out, Pt.2) : Frustrated by everything around him, Craig runs away. As he wanders the street, he befriends a young busker nicknamed, “Skinny”.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Venus, Pt. 1 : As Paige and Spinner awkwardly discuss last night's surprising kiss-fest, Darcy interrupts. She regrets their fight and breakup. But Spinner tells her he meant what he said – if Darcy can’t accept him, past and all, they're through.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Venus, Pt. 2 : Another year at Degrassi kicks off and Manny decides she’s going to be a serious actress, whatever it takes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Death of a Disco Dancer : Manny’s still foggy on what exactly it was that happened at Peter’s party the night before. She knows she made a pretty racy video but Peter will erase everything… or so he says.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Foolin' : Paige has got her whole life mapped out. She plans on being accepted into the marketing program at the best university in Canada.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Weddings, Parties, Anything : JT has got his license. He’s got a steady girlfriend in Liberty, who happens to be Student Council President. So why is he feeling anything but a “man”? Because Liberty’s in control.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: I Still Haven't Found What I'm Looking For : After all the craziness of last year, Craig has one overriding goal: no drama. He’s focused on his friends, his family, his studies, and his band – a reconstituted Downtown Sasquatch but no Spinner - a new addition is rocking the drum-kit…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Turned Out, Pt. 1 : After proving he’s still got talent on the hardwood, Jimmy is invited to try out for the Wheelchair Basketball Association’s Junior Team. It’s Jimmy’s second chance at athletic stardom, and an opportunity to make his father proud.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Turned Out, Pt. 2 : As Liberty’s pregnancy enters its sixth month, she and JT are forced to face reality: even though no longer a couple, they have to deal with the pregnancy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tell it to My Heart : Desperate for cash, JT has stolen drugs from the pharmacy… He becomes entangled in a web between his boss, the drug dealer, and the police.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Redemption Song : Someone’s definitely interested in Marco. But as it turns out, Tim is interested in Marco, but not for the expected reason. Tim knows Marco is gay, and has been struggling with how to come out to his friends and family.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Kai-lan's Big Play : Kai-lan and her friends are putting on a play based on the Chinese folktale about the Monkey King. When Rintoo gets the part that Hoho wanted, Hoho quits the play and it's up to the viewer to help Kai-lan figure out what to do.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Kai-lan's Big Surprise : Today, Kai-lan needs our help to plan a very special party for Ye-Ye to thank him for all he does for us. But when everything she plans goes wrong, Kai-lan gets very frustrated and starts to cry - much to the surprise of her friends!

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Stompy Rides Again : Kai-lan and her friends are riding a TRAIN all the way to Hula Duck Island! Everyone loves riding the train through the backyard, but when it gets to Stompy's house, there are no seats left for their elephant friend on the train.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: Rintoo's Big Flip : Kai-lan and her friends go to see the Chinese Rabbit Acrobats and are invited to be in the show! Rintoo is sure he'll be able to flip without practicing - no problem! Kai-lan needs your help to convince Rintoo to practice.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan
programme.desc: The Ants Dance : Kai-lan sees the ants dancing in Ant City, and is inspired to help them put on a big dance show for everyone to see! But when they start to get ready, a bossy ant named BuBu makes all the choices about the dance routine.

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan

programme.title: Ni Hao, Kai-lan

programme.desc: The Little Match Girl : Sam might lose Cheers for good when Rebecca burns down most of the bar.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Beer Is Always Greener : Carla is forced to clean up her act when she has to find another job while Cheers is being rebuilt.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The King Of Beers : Norm's new job seems like a dream come true when he becomes a beer taster at a brewery.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Magnificent Six : Sam is takes on a challenge to prove he's "the greatest ladies man."

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Do Not Forsake Me, O', My Postman : Cliff's old flame returns to Cheers with-child, announcing he's the father.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Teaching With The Enemy : Lilith breaks the news to Frasier that she's been having an affair.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Girl In The Plastic Bubble : Frasier climbs out on a ledge and threatens suicide after Lilith reveals her affair.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Ill Gotten Gaines : Woody takes advantage of catching his father-in-law in a twisted affair.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Feelings... Whoa, Whoa, Whoa : John Hill confronts his feelings for Carla after his heart attack.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Daddy's Middle-Aged Girl : Rebecca's father makes a surprise visit to Cheers and wants her to move home.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Love Me, Love My Car : Sam stoops to low levels in an effort to buy his old car back.

programme.title: South Park: Monsieur Hankey, le petit caca Noël
programme.desc: Monsieur Hankey, le petit caca Noël : Noël approche et les enfants préparent un spectacle sur la naissance de Jésus. Mais voilà qui ne plait pas aux parents de Kyle, dont la famille est juive.

programme.title: South Park: Chirurgie Esthétique
programme.desc: Chirurgie Esthétique : M. Garrison doit subir une rhinoplastie et se fait remplacer par la sulfureuse Mlle Ellen.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Mecha Streisand : Barbara Streisand cherche à former le diamant de Panthéos pour revêtir sa forme ultime, Mecha Streisand, et détruire South Park.

programme.title: South Park: La mère de Cartman est une folle du cul
programme.desc: La mère de Cartman est une folle du cul : Cartman ignore qui est son père. Alphonse Mephisto veut bien l'aider mais les recherches coûtent 3000 $.

programme.title: South Park: La mère de Cartman est toujours une folle du cul
programme.desc: La mère de Cartman est toujours une folle du cul : Le suspense est à son comble, Mephisto va dévoiler qui est le père de Cartman, lorsque soudain on lui tire dessus.

programme.title: South Park: Le Charmeur de poules
programme.desc: Le Charmeur de poules : Le bibliobus arrive à South Park. Les enfants n'en ont cure, jusqu'à ce qu'une affaire de viol de poules n'éclate.

programme.title: South Park: Le Zizi de Ike
programme.desc: Le Zizi de Ike : Kyle apprend que ses parents veulent faire circoncire son frère. Pendant ce temps, M. Mackey découvre la drogue.

programme.title: South Park: Le Foetus Siamo Maxiliaire
programme.desc: Le Foetus Siamo Maxiliaire : Les citoyens de South Park viennent en aide à l'infirmière de l'école, qui a une étrange dégénérescence médicale.

programme.title: South Park: La grenouille mexicaine hypnotique du sud du Sri Lanka
programme.desc: La grenouille mexicaine hypnotique du sud du Sri Lanka : Jimbo et Ned animent une émission sur la chasse sur une chaîne du câble.

programme.title: South Park: La Ville au bord de l'Eternité
programme.desc: La Ville au bord de l'Eternité : Le bus scolaire est coincé face à une falaise. Mlle Crabtree va chercher de l'aide et devient alors une vedette.

programme.title: South Park: L'Eté, Ca Craint
programme.desc: L'Eté, Ca Craint : Alors que Jimbo et Ned veulent faire des feux d'artifice pour le 4 juillet, M. Garrison s'aperçoit que M. Toc a disparu et qu'il est 'son côté gay'.

programme.title: South Park: Les Boulettes du Chef au Chocolat Salé
programme.desc: Les Boulettes du Chef au Chocolat Salé : Le festival de Sundance arrive à South Park. Mais les festivaliers étouffent M. Hankey avec leurs déjections pleines de nourriture bio.

programme.title: South Park: La Varicelle
programme.desc: La Varicelle : Les parents de South Park décident de donner la varicelle à leurs enfants pour éviter qu'ils ne l'attrapent vieux.

programme.title: South Park: Roger Ebert Devrait Manger moins de Gras
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Devrait Manger moins de Gras : La classe de Mr. Garrison est emmenée au planétarium de South Park, qui est un lieu des plus ennuyeux.

programme.title: South Park: La Garçonnière
programme.desc: La Garçonnière : Alors que Stan doit construire une garçonnière pour jouer à 'action ou vérité' avec Wendy, ses parents se séparent.

programme.title: South Park: Les Journées Vaches
programme.desc: Les Journées Vaches : C'est la fête de la vache à South Park. La programmation inclut rodéo et fête foraine.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef Aid : Chef a été spolié: on lui a volé des droits sur ses chansons.

programme.title: South Park: Poisson Sanglant
programme.desc: Poisson Sanglant : Tante Flo, la sœur de Sharon Marsh, offre à son neveu un poisson rouge. Mais Stan découvre que c'est en réalité un serial killer.

programme.title: South Park: Joyeux Noël Charlie Manson
programme.desc: Joyeux Noël Charlie Manson : Kyle, Kenny et Cartman s'en vont pour les fêtes de Noël dans le Nebraska pour aller rendre visite à la grand-mère de Cartman.

programme.title: South Park: Gnomes
programme.desc: Gnomes : Mr. Tweek risque de perdre son café à cause de la concurrence des cafés Harbucks.

programme.title: South Park: Tropicale, Schtropicale
programme.desc: Tropicale, Schtropicale : Les garçons sont envoyés dans la forêt tropicale du Costa Rica avec les enfants de la chorale.

programme.title: South Park: Combustion Spontanée
programme.desc: Combustion Spontanée : Les citoyens de South Park prennent feu sans explication. Trouvera-t-on la cause de ces combustions spontanées?

programme.title: South Park: La Maman de Chef
programme.desc: La Maman de Chef : Depuis que Chef a rencontré la fille de ses rêves, les garçons se sentent delaissés.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek contre Craig
programme.desc: Tweek contre Craig : Les garçons forcent leurs réticents camarades de classe, Tweek et Craig à se battre.

programme.title: South Park: Les Jakovasaures
programme.desc: Les Jakovasaures : Cartman découvre un Jakovasaure femelle, puis un mâle.

programme.title: South Park: Le Panda du Harcèlement Sexuel
programme.desc: Le Panda du Harcèlement Sexuel : Un panda, venu dans la classe de Stan et de ses amis expliquer le principe du harcèlement sexuel et encourager sa dénonciation, déclenche une folie du procès à South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Orgie de Chat
programme.desc: Orgie de Chat : Mme Cartman va à la fête donnée chez M. Mackey et laisse son fils sous la garde de Shelly Marsh.

programme.title: South Park: Deux Hommes tout Nus dans un Jacuzzi
programme.desc: Deux Hommes tout Nus dans un Jacuzzi : Après avoir laissé Shelley chez les Cartman, la famille Marsh se rend chez M. Mackey, et Stan est relégué à la cave avec d'autres enfants pas très fréquentables. Pendant ce temps, les papas de South Park expérimentent le jacuzzi.

programme.title: South Park: Les Scouts juifs
programme.desc: Les Scouts juifs : Pendant que leurs parents sont à la fêtes, Kyle, Ike et Kenny sont à une fête religieuse juif. Ils se rendent compte rapidement que cette cérémonie sera propice à un complot.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpokomon
programme.desc: Chinpokomon : Les enfants sont pris dans la folie Chinpokomon qui est en fait une conspiration anti-americaine de nostalgiques de Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: South Park: Ethernopien dans l'Espace
programme.desc: Ethernopien dans l'Espace : Pascal la Dalle cherche où reloger son village pour qu'ils échappent aux missionnaires chrétiens.

programme.desc: A Bird in the Head Hurts : Ritchie claims he keeps being attacked by a giant woodpecker.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Gesundheit, Darling : Rob begins to worry after neighbor Jerry suggests Rob's recent sneezing fits are psychosomatic expressions of repressed rage at Laura.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own : Rob feels that he has betrayed his dentist friend, Jerry Helper when he lets another dentist work on his teeth.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Somebody Has to Play Cleopatra : While directing the annual variety show, Rob becomes frustrated by spousal jealousies as he tries to pair the perfect 'Cleopatra' to 'Mark Antony' for the lead roles.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Cat Burglar : After a string of burglaries in the neighborhood, the Petrie home is pillaged. But the police are baffled as it happened.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Foul Weather Girl : Laura sees a weather girl as a threat to her marriage.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Will You Be My Wife? : Rob recounts the wrath he encountered when he broke his engagement with his hometown sweetheart, Dorothy after he and Laura became engaged.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Ray Murdock's X-Ray : Rob finds himself in hot water after giving a television interview in which he unwittingly portrays his wife Laura as a nut.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: I Was a Teenage Head Writer : Rob leaves the show after Mel rejects his script and is upset when Buddy and Sally don't join him.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: It May Look Like a Walnut : Rob and Laura watch a scary movie only to find certain details of that movie coming true the following day.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: My Husband Is a Check-Grabber : Laura tries to break Rob of his expensive habit of picking up the check.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Don't Trip Over That Mountain : To his regret, Rob ignores Laura's warning to be careful on the slopes during his first skiing excursion.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Give Me Your Walls : The Petries hire a painter who ends up painting much more than just their living room.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Sam Pomerantz Scandals : Rob, Laura, and the office gang put together a variety show to help out an old friend.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: I'm No Henry Walden : Rob finds himself very out of place at a dinner party for celebrated literati.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Divorce : Rob finds himself caught in the middle after Buddy announces he is going to divorce Pickles.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: It's a Shame She Married Me : Laura's old flame re-enters the Petries' lives as Alan Brady's newest sponsor.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Birthday : Kirby learns the truth behind her father's suicide; Krystle tells a stunned Alexis of her pregnancy; Fallon and Jeff announce they will remarry. Blake is planning to attack a nation involved in the China Seas Deal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Check : Blake travels to Hong Kong to patch up the China Seas oil deal and learns Ahmed has left the country; Mark blackmails Alexis for $100,000, and McVane watches as he deposits the check; Kirby attempts to kill Alexis but is unsuccessful.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Engagement : Alexis thwarts Blake's loan extension; Sammy Jo arrives in Denver to see her son; after quarreling with Alexis, Mark is found dead after a fall from her balcony.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: New Lady in Town : Blake mortgages the mansion to raise money; Tracy tells Alexis of her affair with Dex; Alexis is questioned about Mark's death; Sammy Jo intends to obtain custody of her son; an unknown woman, full of curiosity about Alexis, checks into La Mirage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Nightmare : Kirby's attempt to kill Alexis is unsuccessful, and Alexis promises to remain silent if Kirby will leave Adam; Sammy Jo reveals the culprit behind Claudia's mystery calls; Fallon is gripped with a seizure and drives off as her wedding is about to begin.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Disappearance : Following a serious traffic accident, Fallon mysteriously vanishes. Dex and Steven bail Alexis out of jail. Sammy Jo attempts to seduce Adam. Alexis flatters Adam by suggesting he work with her defense attorney, Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Mortgage : Steven accuses Adam of conspiring with Sammy Jo to kidnap Danny. Blake arranges to take out a mortgage on the mansion. He little suspects Alexis has signed the note and will become the owner if he defaults.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon : To secure financing for his bankrupt company, Blake arranges to see Billy Waite, a notoriously underhanded oil man. Jeff continues his search for Fallon. Impatient with the progress her lawyer is making on her defense, Alexis fires Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Rescue : In Seattle, Jeff and Blake learn the woman who died in the plane crash with Peter DeVilbis cannot be positively identified, but the ring she was wearing is indeed Fallon's wedding band. Back in Denver, Fallon's moving funeral is held.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Trial : Blake visits Dominique at La Mirage to discuss her recent revelation. She tells Blake that her mother was a long-time mistress of his father and has evidence to prove it. At Alexis' trial, a neighbor offers powerful evidence that incriminates Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Verdict : On the witness stand Steven testifies he saw Alexis push Mark to his death. Jeff sees other women in an attempt to forget Fallon, but remains obsessed with his ex-wife. Alexis takes the stand and testifies.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Amanda : Adam and Dex vow to prove Alexis' innocence and begin a determined campaign. The woman who testified she had seen Alexis on the terrace with Mark had hosted a party that evening and snapped photographs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Secret : Amanda insists Alexis acknowledge their relationship and begs her to reveal her father's identity. Alexis tells her it was simply an anonymous ski instructor in Gstaad. Steven and Alexis reconcile.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Domestic Intrigue : Blake offers to help Amanda find her father. Claudia goes out with Dean on a dinner, while Steven rejects Luke. Jeff ends up sleeping with Nicole. Dominique goes to Istanbul to meet with Rashid Ahmed.

programme.desc: Broken Bones : Tara & Stephen have a home they want to make more functional for their six-person family. They believe the bones of their home are in good shape, but are about to find out they have some mending to do.

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The Apple Doesn't Fall : Aunt Joan is forced to receive treatment from Martin after nearly running someone over. The Doc is approached by Alison Lane, who worries about her daughter Delph's behavior.

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Better the Devil : Life in the beautiful Cornish village of Portwenn has become ever more infuriating for Dr. Martin Ellingham since his and Louisa's heart-wrenching decision to call off their wedding.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: No Safe Place : A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Daughter's Journey : Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Special Tribute
programme.desc: Forensic Files : 25 years after its premiere, Forensic Files remains the most successful true-crime series of all time. Inspired by the O.J. Simpson murder case, the series went onto over 400 episodes where science catches the bad guys.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Home Evasion : In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Magic Bullet : A fifteen-year-old boy dies from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while sitting in the lobby of his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, made-to-scale models and the latest in forensic animation are used to find the cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The House That Roared : A woman disappears and her husband becomes the prime suspect — especially after police find a huge bloodstain on the carpet of their bedroom. When they spray the bedroom with Luminol, they discover it was awash with blood spatter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Deadly Rebellion : Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Cereal Killer : When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Horse Play : In 1980, Michigan resident Shannon Mohr died in what her new husband, David Davis, reported to be a horseback riding accident. After her death, Shannon's family reported that Davis seemed far from grief-stricken.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Lights Out : In this episode, the decade-old murder of a young Texas housewife is investigated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Letter Perfect : A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Similar Circumstances : Robert Sims returns home after working the night shift and finds his wife unconscious on the kitchen floor. Their son is fast asleep in an upstairs bedroom, but their six-week-old daughter, Heather, is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bed of Deceit : A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Grave Danger : A young man was killed in a mysterious car crash, but the evidence at the scene led investigators to believe it was not an accident. Forensic science revealed what really happened and the truth devastated three families.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Van-ished : A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Plastic Fire : A woman convicted of killing her mother in a car fire is granted a new trial. An expert witness has a different opinion as to how the fire started and, if proven, would clear the woman of any culpability.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Cold Hearted : When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Good as Gold : On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Dirty Deed : In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, Eileen and Derrick Severs disappear from their home in a small village in Great Britain and police find evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Printed Proof : When two women went missing and were later found brutally murdered, police wondered if they were victims of a hate crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bound for Jail : A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Weakest Link : The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bump in the Night : When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nice Threads : A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Naked Justice : When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with judge Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Undertaken : The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Just Desserts : The prime suspect had a criminal record and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal double homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.desc: With Baited Breath : Fishermen flock to catch a giant fish that is said to lurk in the lake. When hundreds of sporting enthusiasts descend on the same area for the Mud Run, danger arises.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The FBI Declassified: The Spies Next Door : Inside one of the Bureau's most important counterintelligence investigations to track Russian operatives living in America and seeking critical secrets.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Nightmare in Napa : A report on the October 2004 murders of former beauty queen Leslie Mazzara and her roommate, Adriane Insogna, in the bedrooms of their Napa, California home. A third roommate, Lauren Mianza, sleeping downstairs, was not harmed and was the only witness

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Justice For Sheila? : This report offers fresh insight into the brutal murder of Sheila Bellush, a Sarasota, Florida mother of quadruplets who was killed in front of her children.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: My Father's Killer : James Bernard Campbell entered Suezann Bosler's home, murdered her father and almost killed her. 48 HOURS follows Suezann as she returns to the crime scene and then focuses on her unusual crusade for justice.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Father and Son : A teenager makes a discovery that could prove his mother's death was not suicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: To Hell and Back : An interview with 17-year-old Jacque Marris who reveals new details about her abduction and how she and Tamara Brooks, another teenage victim, survived a harrowing 12-hour kidnapping on Aug. 1, 2002.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A Mother Accused : This report investigates alleged incidents of Shaken Baby Syndrome, focusing on accusations involving Paulette and Kelly Welch, a Mormon couple living in Idaho Falls, Idaho, whose adopted son Stockton died on May 1, 1999 following a fall in their home.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Secrets, Lies and Alibis : John and Susan Sutton were sleeping in separate rooms in their Florida home, when a gunman entered their house and shot both of them several times. Susan was killed, but John survived. Nothing was taken from the house, proving the murder premeditated.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Getting Away with Murder? : A report on families who have experienced the violent death of a loved one and believe they know the identity of the killer but lack evidence to back the charge.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Lost in Paradise : In 1976, Deborah Gardner, a Peace Corps worker, was murdered while on assignment in the South Pacific island nation of Tonga. Dennis Priven, a 24-year-old fellow Peace Corps worker, who appeared to be obsessed with Gardner, was charged by Tongan police.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Dangerous Liaisons : A report on the July 2003 murder of Sandra Rozzo of Pinellas Park, Florida, including the police investigation that led to the eventual conviction and imprisonment of her ex-lover Timothy ‘Tracey’ Humphrey and his wife Ashley Laney Humphrey.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Secrets of Waco : The 25th anniversary of the deadly standoff in Waco, Texas; a retired United Parcel Service driver reveals his experiences with cult leader David Koresh; a former ATF agent tells about his involvement.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Beyond the Boardwalk : A report on the deaths of four women: Tracy Ann Roberts, Kim Raffo, Barbara Briedor, and Molly Jean Dilts, all suspected prostitutes and/or drug addicts. They were all found on November 20, 2006, in a ditch near the Golden Key Motel in Atlantic City, NJ.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Sugar Land Conspiracy : In December 2003, the Whitaker family-- Kent, his wife Tricia, and their sons, Bart and Kevin-- returned home from dinner. Upon entering the house, Kevin and Tricia were fatally shot. The investigation revealed that the murders had been planned by Bart.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: One of Their Own : A report about how female Los Angeles Police Detective Stephanie Lazarus was charged with the 1986 murder of Sherri Mae Rasmussen. The victim, newly married to Lazarus’ ex-boyfriend, was attacked, beaten and shot to death in her Los Angeles home.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Precious Angels : A report on the brutal murders in a Dallas, Texas suburb of Darlie and Darin Routier’s two sons -- Devon, 6 and Damon, 5. Darlie who claims that the boys were killed by an intruder, suffered serious knife wounds to her throat.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: To Catch a Stalker : Fifteen-year-old Penny Chang of Shaker Heights, Ohio was stalked and killed by her older brother’s best friend, 21-year-old Scott Strothers.

programme.title: Income Property

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Hawk’s Nest : With property taxes and maintenance fees going through the roof, Tara-Lee and Bryan need their rarely used vacation rental to start paying for itself. With soaring cliff top views, Scott’s renovation takes flight.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Parent’s Paradise : Aleisha and Justin’s rundown vacation property is not rentable. Scott gives it a new lease on life by making it more attractive to the largest demographic in the vacation rental market; parents with children.

programme.title: Scott's Vacation House Rules
programme.desc: Winter Wonderland : Siblings Sherri and Mark enjoy their family property all summer long but it’s rarely used in the winter. To take advantage of the lucrative winter rental season – Scott transforms the property into a paradise for anyone.

programme.title: Income Property

programme.title: Income Property

programme.title: Income Property

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers
programme.desc: Chilled to the Bone : A brutal murder and frozen crime scene shatter an idyllic Idaho town. A suspect’s bizarre confession has police hoping for a quick resolution, but all is not what it seems to be.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers

programme.desc: A Bold Move : When Mike helps his son, MJ, renovate his tiny bungalow, MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by his father's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second story.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Moving Up in the World : Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams; while the second floor walls go up, the house is exposed, and MJ decides not to shield the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Decisions, Decisions : Construction goes smoothly while Mike and MJ work side by side; when Mike is forced to leave the job site, MJ makes some important structural decisions without his father.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Distractions and Disagreements : Tensions run high as Mike and MJ engage in disagreements; MJ's nerves are frayed as he prepares to ask Lisa an important question while on a getaway; Mike takes over the job site, with some frustrating consequences for MJ.

programme.title: Holmes & Holmes
programme.desc: Trouble at the Finish : MJ runs into financial setbacks, tiling troubles and door debates with his father; as tensions mount, MJ must come to a decision that has repercussions for the completion of his home.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Heartland Horror : Teenager Nolan Lydolph has seen ghosts his entire life. But after he and his parents return home from a ghost tour in Missouri, strange spirits creep through their home. Nolan undertakes a life-threatening struggle to rid his family of an undaunted evil.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Eternal Grief : Shortly after moving into her home in Indiana, Jennifer Patterson receives a warning from a stranger that she is not alone in the house. When she hears strange voices, she begins to wonder if the previous owner, who died in the house, still inhabits it.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Games of Lies : In 2012, Olivia and Jesse Barbour move into their dream home with five-year-old daughter Marie. Soon after, Marie makes her first friend in the neighborhood, a boy named Jackson. Olivia is thrilled until she realizes Jackson is really an imaginary friend.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Demons Never Die : Shortly after starting a new job and moving his family to the suburbs, Bill Toler suspects his house is haunted. Paranormal investigators uncover a portal in their home and discover a demon followed Bill home from his job at the state penitentiary.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Evil Rises : After a major surgery forces Jacinda Rearick to recuperate at home, she discovers orbs in family photos. At first, Jacinda believes that they are her deceased parents watching over her. But something much more sinister is invading her home.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Tunnel Of Death : Candace and John St. Clair explore a haunted tunnel with a gruesome history where slaves were buried alive. Stealthily, an uninvited guest follows them home. Attacked by the entity, they invite paranormal experts to investigate and cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: House Of Sorrows : In 2012, Darrin and Jamie Shriver move into a home with tragic history. Darrin unwittingly invites dark entities back into the home threatening the safety of his wife and new baby. Paranormal investigators determine a demonic entity is in the home.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Ghosts Of War : When Dennis Pongratz finds his deceased father's Army belongings, he unlocks a treasure trove of WWII memorabilia, including an armband removed from a Nazi soldier killed in battle. Soon the Pongratz home becomes a battleground between good and evil.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Vision Of Terror : When Stacy Stowe hears ghostly sounds in her home, she assumes it's the spirit of her late husband who died in a tragic car accident. But a psychic warns Stacy that she will find no peace until she closes the portal that has opened the door for evil.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Fear Feeders : Soon after Al Gonzalez purchases a home outside Fort Wayne, Indiana, he begins to hear strange noises and sees unexplainable shadows. Paranormal investigators determine the entities in Al's home are dangerous and that he is not their first victim.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Ghost Confessions : An unknown entity appears to find pleasure in terrifying 17-year-old Macy Sherman, her younger sister Kelsey and their mom Carrie. The family reaches out for help, praying that they can get rid of the spirit intent on staying in their home forever.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Love Curse : When Lee and his new bride Claire settle into their first home, an evil entity emerges and attacks Claire while she's carrying the couple's unborn baby. A ghost hunter determines the dark spirit is a demon and brings in demonologists to cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Demon's Lair : For years, the Cranmer family thought their historic Pittsburgh dream home was haunted by a harmless ghost. But, when the activity grows violent, they fight back with the only weapon they have, prayer; culminating with an exorcism of the house.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Ghost Protector : A mother and daughter both believe their house is haunted. But while the mother believes it's the spirit of her murdered boyfriend, her daughter believes it's much darker. Paranormal experts investigate and uncover an epic battle between good and evil.

programme.title: A Haunting
programme.desc: Immortal Love : Shortly after Whitney's family moving into their first home, a restless spirit shatters the serenity of their suburban life. Whitney calls in a paranormal team who uncover the truth behind the spirit's tragic death and his intense obsession with Whitney.

programme.title: Poisonous Liaisons
programme.desc: Double Deceit : The story of America's first-known case of murder by insulin poisoning, committed by a Californian con-artist who thought he could outsmart the law.

programme.title: Social Media Murders
programme.desc: The Murder of Alex Rodda : Alex Rodda, a 15-year-old teenager, is murdered by 18-year-old Matthew Mason in December 2019, six weeks after they first exchange messages via social media.

programme.title: Social Media Murders
programme.desc: The Murder of Ashley Wadsworth : Exploring the death of a Canadian Mormon teenager Ashley Wadsworth due to social media grooming by British teenager Jack Sepple, leading to a fatal outcome during their planned meeting.

programme.title: Social Media Murders
programme.desc: The Murder of Mikey Rainsford : A skateboarder is murdered in Liverpool; missing a murder weapon and a motive, a Snapchat message where the killers brag about their plan helps the police crack the case.

programme.title: Social Media Murders
programme.desc: The Murder of Bianca Devins : Bianca Devins' death at the hands of friend Brandon Clark; exploring the virtual world of misogyny he lived in and learning why the victim's family had to battle social media platforms to remove viral images of her murder.

programme.title: Made for Murder
programme.desc: Virginia Vertetis : A frantic call to police alerts the NYPD that one of their own is under attack; retired cop, Patrick Giluley is a seasoned veteran; discovering if he is a match for a woman scorned.

programme.title: Made for Murder
programme.desc: Hannegret Donnelly : The story of Hannegret Donnelly, who controlled her husband, Christopher, with horrific violence and abuse before eventually killing him with a rolling pin in the family home in Buckinghamshire.

programme.title: Made for Murder
programme.desc: Willy Inmon : Willy Imnon murdered three people and experts examine what drove him to commit these senseless acts.

programme.title: Made for Murder
programme.desc: Denise Williams : Denise Williams's husband Mike disappears without a trace while on a hunting trip; Mike's mother is determined to uncover the truth about her son's death.

programme.title: Made for Murder
programme.desc: Thomas Dunkley : Thomas Dunkley hero worships boxer Shaun Cummins; when an accident leaves the fighter paralysed, he seizes the chance to become his right-hand man; however, nobody could have guessed that he would go on to become his killer.

programme.title: Murder At First Swipe
programme.desc: Murder At First Swipe : Serving up a criminal collection of shows to feed your need for intrigue. Watch questionable people do very bad things. Total Crime, all the time.

programme.title: The Real Manhunter
programme.desc: The Chohan Family Murders : Find out why a family of five was slaughtered and hidden by a killer.

programme.title: The Real Manhunter
programme.desc: The Murders of Julian Sanders and Colin Foulkes : Unraveling a tangled web of friendship and murder that leads to a single suspect.

programme.title: The Real Manhunter
programme.desc: The Murders of Anne Carryer and Elizabeth Blood : Revisiting the murder of two women who were in the wrong place at the wrong time.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: On and Off with Love, Not Money! : After a 5 year on and off again relationship Cindy called it quits. She wants the money Tramere owes her to bring closure to their relationship.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Jealousy the Green Monster : Vanessa says Visall's temper and jealousy is destroying their relationship.

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Costly Ultimatum : Joseph wants his girlfriend, Amy, to move out or start paying rent after refusing to have a threesome.

programme.title: Blind Date
programme.desc: Blind Date : "What freaky stuff have you done?"

programme.title: Blind Date
programme.desc: Blind Date : "What kind of girl do you date?" "Any girl that puts out, really..."

programme.title: Blind Date
programme.desc: Blind Date : "I never thought in a million years I'd meet my future husband on Blind Date."

programme.title: Blind Date
programme.desc: Blind Date : "Will you Molly, whose last name I don't know, marry me?"

programme.title: Blind Date
