programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Wigging Out Over an Unpaid Loan : Anastasia is a hair stylist here to sue one of her clients for an unpaid loan and emotional distress.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Car Sale Gone Sour : Andrew is suing Rachel after buying a lemon car due to her distracting him by dressing provocatively.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Three's a Crowd : Brian is being sued by his wife Doretha for an illegal eviction after she left when he brought another woman home.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Steve Outraged! : Jack is worried about his grandchildren because his daughter-in-law Carol has been negligent and hot-tempered. Then, Kendra explains why she suddenly put Corey’s baby up for adoption.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Did You Murder My Daughter? : Teenager Megan lives with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. Megan cannot attend school, find a job, or even eat without his OK! Can her aunt and Steve get through to her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: My Man Has a Secret Life : Damon confesses to his girlfriend Shanice that he's been cheating on her with 2 women and has a kid with Danielle who wants him to sign over his parental rights! Monica is scared that her fiancée Cedric is unfaithful. Can he prove her wrong?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Look What You Did to Your Baby : Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: I'm 27…Is My Teen Boyfriend Cheating? : Rachelle believes that her man Chris may be cheating with as many as 50 women, including her sister! Then, Carrie was shocked when she found out that her man Chris lied about his military service.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: I Don't Want To Meet Your Baby! : Kyle denies that he fathered Citasia’s child. His mom says that he’s lying. Then, Josh fathered 5 kids. Dana says that he better prepare for number 6 because she claims he’s the father of her baby!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: I'm Only 16…Am I Her Baby's Dad? : Maury says “You ARE the father!” But are those the words the nervous, alleged fathers want to hear? Or will “You are NOT the father” send the moms into shock? Find out the results on today’s MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Beware! Hidden Dangers Caught on Tape : On this special edition of The Maury Show, Maury brings celebrity guests to the stage to share some of the most intense and shocking real-life footage ever caught on tape.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did You Cheat And Have A Baby With Our Neighbor? : These women, once and for all, want to prove to their men they ARE the father of their baby and they need to be responsible for their child. Plus, did man really father a child with his neighbor behind his partner's back?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: I Slept With Your Fiancee…Your Baby Belongs To Me! : Alexis and Rachean met while working at a fast-food restaurant. Is Alexis now pregnant with Rachaen's child? Then, Fred cheated on Amanda with her ex-lesbian lover Ashlynn! Now both women are saying that Fred is the father!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Decisive Battle! Giolla vs. the Straw Hats! : Doflamingo recounts for Law the surprising history of the Don Quixote Family, while Nami and the others battle the insane and powerful artist, Giolla! Her ultimate attack renders them incapacitated, and prompts the betrayal of one of their closest allies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Beautiful Sword! Cavendish of the White Horse! : Law is pinned by Fujitora, and Doflamingo has the upper hand! Only the most cunning of tricks could save Law's plan to hand Caesar over to Nami & the others! Meanwhile, the Sunny falls into danger again, & the battle for Block D heats up in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Big Clash! Sanji vs. Doflamingo! : Law must put himself in harm's way to defend the Sunny and the Straw Hats from Doflamingo's all-out assault! With barely enough time to save the crew, plans change and send the Sunny on a new mission -- but will it be able to get underway?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca's Special Attack! Last-Ditch Sword Dance! : Law & Doflamingo are embroiled in a heated showdown which triggers Momonosuke's memories of Doflamingo's cruelty from the first time they met; meanwhile, after a tearful fanboy conversation Zoro finally gets to see Luffy but all eyes are fixed on Rebecca.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Most Violent Fighter! Logan vs. Rebecca! : Bartolomeo searches the Colosseum for Luffy but stumbles upon the medical center for the losers of the battles in the ring, but is everything at this center as it seems? Meanwhile, Rebecca has to fend off Rolling Logan's vicious bone-crushing grip attack.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Big Surprise! The True Identity of the Toy Soldier! : The losers of the Colosseum battle who are being held below the infirmary have a surprising person in their midst! But do they have a clue as to their terrifying fate? Meanwhile, the Tontatta Kingdom's history is made clear.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Horrible Past! The Secret of Dressrosa! : Bartolomeo finally finds Luffy and starts to lead him to Zoro, while the toy soldier begins to tell the heart-breaking story of how Doflamingo cheated the Riku dynasty out of their control of Dressrosa!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Nightmare! The Tragic Night of Dressrosa! : As the toy soldier's story continues, the sad fate of King Riku and his army, and his daughter Princess Viola, is revealed as well as how the people of Dressrosa fell into the hands of Doflamingo. And all the toys in the country share a mysterious secret.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Showdown Between the Warlords! Law vs. Doflamingo! : Zoro, Kin'emon, and Luffy are reunited again, but little do they know that their reunion is being monitored by a potential threat! Meanwhile, the battle rages on between Doflamingo and Law as these two powerhouses clash.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Two Great Rivals Meet Each Other! Straw Hat and Heavenly Demon! : Zoro and Kin'emon make a mad dash to save Law but Navy Admiral Fujitora stands in their way, bringing his full power against them. The Navy is in hot pursuit as a ship approaches with unexpected visitors from the past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy Astonished! The Man Who Inherits Ace's Will! : After revealing the horrible history of Dressrosa, Toy Soldier now shares their plan to liberate the Tontatta Kingdom and bring down the Doflamingo Family, Operation SOP. Luffy bumps into a heavily-wounded Bellamy and Bartolomeo

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Operation SOP Starts! Usoland Charges Forth! : Usopp and Robin make their way via an underground tunnel dug by the tiny people of the Tontatta Tribe - a tunnel so small in fact, that Franky couldn't fit! Instead, Franky makes his way to the Toy House.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Burning Passion! Rebecca vs. Suleiman! : As the contenders for the battle of Block D dwindle to only thirty, Rebecca has her hands full with the menacing Suleiman the Beheader! All hope seems lost that she can take him down and move on to the finals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The End of the Match?! A Surprising Result of Block D! : The battle for Block D comes to a shocking end and the winner that emerges from the cloud of dust stuns the audience even more! Meanwhile, Luffy, Zoro, Kin'emon, and Wicka of the Tontatta Tribe are about to reach the lift to the palace.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Admiral's Decision! Fujitora vs. Doflamingo! : Viola, aka Violet, once a great princess of the Dressrosa family, shows Luffy & the others a secret entrance into the palace which avoids the use of the heavily-guarded lift. In the palace's Suit Chamber, Navy Admiral Fujitora reveals his plans.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Final Round Starts! Diamante the Hero Shows Up! : The final round at the Corrida Colosseum finally begins, as Diamante joins the combatants in an all-out struggle to win the Flare-Flare Fruit! As the stakes escalate, can one champion beat the others & snatch the fruit from the Colosseum's newest hazard?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Moving Castle! The Top Executive Pica Rises Up! : Luffy and his group continue their ascent towards Doflamingo's inner sanctum, but standing in their way is an executive of the family whose power is so strong moving past him seems impossible! Meanwhile, Cavendish learns the dark secrets of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dragon Claw Strikes! Lucy's Intimidating Attack! : As Operation SOP finally gets underway but as Leo makes the dash to hide the Tatabasco grape in Sugar's fruit basket, Robin calls for an emergency stop to the plan! Meanwhile, Luffy, Violet, and Zoro are stalled by Pica whose sheer size overwhelms them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Defeat Sugar! The Army of the Little People Charges! : Operation SOP is underway and nearing its final stage! But Trebol proves a far stronger guard for Sugar than was expected, so Robin hatches a plan to lure him away. But is there enough time to execute the plan before the ruse is discovered?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Last Light of Hope! The Secret of Our Commander! : The Tontattas are devastated by Trebol's furious attack, but as Usopp tries to convince Leo to abort the operation, Leo tells him about their commander Toy Soldier's stunning true identity! The Toy Soldier finally shakes off Lao G and gets moving again!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Rupture Human! Gladius Blows Up Big Time! : Zoro continues his deadly duel with the nearly indestructible Pica! While the Toy Soldier narrowly escapes Lao G only to come face to face with Gladius! Luffy continues his mad dash to the top of the palace to face Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Liar! Usoland on the Run! : With the Tontattas beaten, Robin turned into a toy, and Luffy, Franky, and the others busy elsewhere, Usopp is the last hope for Operation SOP! But will he be able to muster the confidence and courage to face the terrible Trebol?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Fateful Encounter! Kyros and King Riku! : Usopp runs into trouble in his battle with Treebol, and flashback sheds light on how a young Kyros made the shocking transition from murderer to one of King Riku's most trusted men.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Operation Failed! Usoland the Hero Dies?! : In the Royal Palace, Viola, Luffy, and the Toy Soldier have hidden themselves outside Doflamingo's chamber, only to have more enemies approach from behind, leaving them surrounded! Meanwhile, Franky is knocked out cold by the Navy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Legend is Back! Kyros' All-out Blow! : Toys all across Dressrosa regain their human form, a flood of forgotten memories return, and Kyros launches a long overdue attack on the villainous tyrant Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Fire Fist Strikes! The Flare-Flare Fruit Power Returns! : Kyros finally taking down Doflamingo leaves Doflamingo's clan shocked! Meanwhile at the Colosseum, Rebecca gets her memories of her loving father Kyros back, and Sabo makes a move to end the championship battle by blowing up the whole ring!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Dashing onto the Scene! The Chief of Staff of the Revolutionary Army - Sabo! : Luffy hurries to free Law, but with their pirate alliance dissolved, will Law still see Luffy as an ally? Meanwhile, Usopp has convinced his newfound followers to destroy the factory! Doflamingo's defeat has thrown Dressrosa into chaos.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Devil's Trap! A Dressrosa Extermination Plan! : The mystery of Doflamingo's return from the dead is revealed! But there isn't much time to ponder how it happened, as his plan to silence the country of Dressrosa unfolds, spelling doom for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The 500 Million Berry Man! Target: Usoland! : As the people of Dressrosa see their friends and loved ones slaughter each other under the manipulation of Doflamingo, memories of 10 years ago rush back, and the truth of that event becomes clear. Doflamingo announces the rules for his deadly game.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Backpack Parade : Backpack, Backpack, yeah!!! Today's the Backpack Parade, where everyone dresses up their backpacks in different costumes. Backpack is super excited 'cause this year she gets to lead the parade with her song.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Bouncy Boots : "Special delivery for Boots the monkey!" Boots' favorite boots are back from the Shoe Shop, but when he tries them on, he starts to bounce, bounce, bounce. These aren't his boots -- these are bouncy boots.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Mayan Adventure : Dora reads us a Mayan story about twin brothers who were amazing ballplayers. A long time ago in a Mayan Kingdom, there was a big Ball Game Championship.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Saves the Three Little Piggies : Dora and Boots are reading their favorite story, "The Three Little Pigs" when suddenly we hear the Piggies calling out for help. Their brick house is missing some bricks and the Big Bad Wolf is going to blow it down!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Big Red Chicken's Magic Show : ABRACADABRA! The Big Red Chicken's putting on a magic show for all of his friends. With an "abracadabra," he pulls a rabbit out of his hat, but when it's time to make the bunny disappear, it doesn't work!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Benny's Treasure : It's Junk Day and Benny's showing Dora and Boots his wagon of cool junk. But when the junk truck accidentally takes Backpack and Map off to the junkyard, it's up to Dora, Boots, Benny and his wagon of stuff to rescue them!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Super Babies' Dream Adventure : It's naptime for the twins and Dora has a special Super Babies naptime story. Once upon a time, the Super Babies were getting ready for their nap but the Dream Fairy never showed up because she was still asleep!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Pirate Treasure Hunt : Pirate Piggy really wants to be in the big Pirate Treasure Hunt, but his Piggies got tummyaches. He needs at least 3 mates to help him find the sunken treasure. Dora, Boots, and L'il Piggy will be his pirate mates -- yay!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Helps the Birthday Wizzle : Dora reads a story about a Wizzle who could grant wishes with his magic wand. On his birthday, it's his turn to make a wish but the wand gets blown away by the wind. Dora needs your help to save the Wizzle's magic wand!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Boots' Banana Wish : Dora and Boots are at an amusement park where they have a special wishing machine. Boots makes a wish: "I wish that when I say, 'bananas,' I get bananas." With a "boing," a bunch of bananas falls down on Boots.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Pegaso Adventure : Dora and Boots hop on Pegaso, the flying horse constellation, for a high-flying adventure to bring home his constellation friends to the Moon before the Sun rises!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Happy Birthday, Super Babies! : Happy Birthday, Super Babies!: It's the Twins' 1st birthday and Dora reads them a very special Super Babies story. Once upon a time, there was a Cake-snatching Bear who stole all the cakes from the birthday boys and girls.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Hair-Raising Adventure : Boots really wants to give his mommy a picture of himself for her birthday, but he's having a really bad hair day! Dora and Boots set out on a Hairy Quest: Boots is ready for his close-up!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baby Winky Comes Home : Dora and Boots find a lovable little space creature named Winky. He came to visit with his family, our Purple Planet friends. But, uh oh, he's lost. We have to get Baby Winky back to his family before their spaceship takes off!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Grumpy Old Troll Gets Married : The Grumpy Old Troll's getting married to Petunia and we all get to be a part of this wedding! Everything's almost ready, except the Grumpy Old Troll forgot to pick up the rings from his Grandma's House! Will we make it in time for the wedding?!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: ¡Vacaciones! : Dora and Boots are going on vacation with Diego and Baby Jaguar at the Rainforest Campground. They're packing everything they need, especially Baby Jaguar's favorite, the Dora Snacks!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Big Red Chicken's Magic Wand : The Big Red Chicken's doing magic tricks for us today! For his first trick, he turns Boots into a chicken! But when he's going to turn him back into a monkey, he lets out a big sneeze that sends the wand flying off into Magic Land where it breaks!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora in Troll Land : Dora and Boots are headed to a brand new playground just over the Troll Bridge. When Dora and Boots get to the Bridge, they see that the Grumpy Old Troll's missing! Map tells us that the Troll is stuck in a magic Hole!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Dance Show : Dora's dance class is having a big show for all of their friends and family. Dora's starting the show and she can't wait for her family to see her dance!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Boots' First Bike : Dora and Boots are heading to the Bike Shop to pick up Boots' very first bike today.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Pepe's School Day Adventure : Dora's helping her new friend, Pepe the Pig, learn all about his new school. Pepe's really excited, especially when he hears that if the class earns 3 gold stars today, they get a popcorn party!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora and Diego Save Atlantis : Dora and Diego Save Atlantis: Dora, Boots, and King Unicornio leave Enchanted Forest to join Diego in making the lost continent of Atlantis rise by ending an ancient feud between unicorns and dragons!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora and Diego Save Atlantis : Dora, Boots, and King Unicornio leave Enchanted Forest to join Diego in making the lost continent of Atlantis rise by ending an ancient feud between unicorns and dragons!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Knighthood Adventure! : Dora's Knighthood Adventure!: Dora and Boots are reading stories about knights with their friends Rocinante the horse and Dapple the donkey when suddenly they hear a cry for help.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Knighthood Adventure! : Dora and Boots are reading stories about knights when suddenly they hear a cry for help. It's a princess who's calling us from the Royal Garden! It turns out that it's not the princess that needs saving – her kitty's stuck in a tree!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Swiper's Favorite Things : Swiper was packing all of his favorite things for a sleepover at his Grandma's House. But just as he was about to go, a big wind came in and blew everything away! Will Swiper find a way to use his new super-Swiper-spin today?!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: A Ribbon for Pinto : When the train to the Big Horse Show breaks down, Dora, Boots, and Pinto the Pony need your help to get there with the ribbons, so Pinto can win his first blue prize ribbon!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Benny the Castaway : Dora and Boots are getting ready for a big beach picnic with their friends, but when Benny gets stranded on Coconut Island, he'll need rescuing from Dora, Boots, and YOU!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Fantastic Gymnastics Adventure : Dora gets to start the Big Gymnastics Show! But when Swiper swipes her special rainbow ribbon, Dora and Boots need your help on a gymnastics-filled adventure to get it back so they can begin the show! Fantastic gymnastics!

programme.title: Dragonwolf
programme.desc: Dragonwolf : A city where depravity and violence has forged a society in which only the lethal and callous can survive, two young men who possess the intellect and ferocity to flourish, carve a name for themselves as the most efficient and unstoppable hit men.

programme.title: Rescue Dawn
programme.desc: Rescue Dawn : In 1965, while bombing Laos, pilot Dieter Dengler crashes in the jungle. Dieter is arrested, tortured and sent to a prison camp, where he organizes an escape plan. A betrayal splits the group and Dieter finds that the jungle is the actual prison.

programme.title: Precious Cargo
programme.desc: Precious Cargo : A crime boss tries to make off with loot that belongs to another thief.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Cold Pursuit : Nels Coxman's quiet life with his wife is upended following the mysterious death of their son. Nels' search for justice turns into a vengeful hunt letting nothing -- and no one -- get in his way.

programme.title: Hercules (2014)
programme.desc: Hercules (2014) : The most towering myth of all time meets up with the mission of a real man in this action-adventure thriller that reveals the famed symbol of courage as he’s never been seen before: finding the hero’s heart that beats beneath his colossal image.

programme.title: Precious Cargo
programme.desc: Precious Cargo : A crime boss tries to make off with loot that belongs to another thief.

programme.title: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: Cold Pursuit : Nels Coxman's quiet life with his wife is upended following the mysterious death of their son. Nels' search for justice turns into a vengeful hunt letting nothing -- and no one -- get in his way.

programme.title: Sex Drive
programme.desc: Sex Drive : When an online hottie offers to help him become a man, Ian embarks on a wild road trip to a sure thing.

programme.title: Bandits
programme.desc: Bandits : The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: Canadian Bacon
programme.desc: Canadian Bacon : Falling approval ratings and a sagging economy, cause a desperate U.S. president to turn America against its most unlikely enemy, Canada. A Niagara Falls sheriff and his band of misfit deputies invade Canada leaving the President's plans in shambles.

programme.title: Wedding Daze

programme.title: Yukon Gold
programme.desc: Race to the Finish : Big Al puts his health on the line to break even; Nika’s brother surprises Chris with a sudden decision; Ken & Guillaume dig deep for one final pay day; and Karl fights water & time as he tries to top his 1,000 oz. goal.

programme.title: Yukon Gold
programme.desc: Grits, Guts & Glory : Big Al's poor haul necessitates opening a new pit; a rookie miner gets Chris' dozer stuck in mud; heavy rain contributes to Karl struggling to find gold; and Bernie pushes the plant to the limit.

programme.title: Yukon Gold
programme.desc: Strike While the Iron Is Hot : A new season starts with a bang for Chris & Nika, but Big Al has devastating setback and two new camps fight weather & bad mountain roads.

programme.title: Yukon Gold
programme.desc: Bloodied, Not Beaten : Big Al’s health takes a hit, Chris struggles with a rookie mine hand while PJ & Andy battle floods and breakdowns.

programme.title: Yukon Gold
programme.desc: The Hiro Curse : Works grinds to a halt for Big Al when Hiro’s Curse returns, while unstable ground shuts Chris down, and Riley clashes with Ed’s father-in-law.

programme.title: Yukon Gold
programme.desc: Hard Lessons : Chris risks his season on a new cut, Andy struggles to manage the mine on his own while Ed and Riley go hunting.

programme.title: Yukon Gold
programme.desc: No Backing Down : A desperate Big Al pushes Hiro to the limit, Chris looks for big gear to salvage his season, while PJ & Andy’s camp has a mini-revolt.

programme.title: Yukon Gold
programme.desc: The Cost of Gold : Big Al’s plans are hurt by no-show staff, PJ’s wife questions if mining is worth it for their family, and Ed & Riley hit their stride - til they run out of fuel.

programme.title: Canadian Pickers
programme.desc: Big Hairy Deal : Keeping one eye out for Big Foot, the Pickers hunt for big deals in Southern B.C. From local memorabilia, to vintage toys, a glitzy silver saddle, and a hot collection of cedar-stripped canoes.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Tossing the Bouquet : Cassie and Sam’s wedding is just days away, but that doesn’t stop Cassie from a little magic meddling to help her friends. On her wedding day, Cassie hatches the type of magical plan that only she could create.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Tale of Two Hearts Pt 1 : As Halloween approaches, Cassie and Sam run into another delay on the way to their wedding and decide to postpone. They won’t be getting married right now, but that doesn’t mean they can’t still have a magical Halloween.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Tale of Two Hearts Pt 2 : As Halloween approaches, Cassie and Sam run into another delay on the way to their wedding and decide to postpone. They won’t be getting married right now, but that doesn’t mean they can’t still have a magical Halloween.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: The Forever Tree Pt 1 : On the eve of her wedding, Cassie's long-lost foster brother Vincent makes an unexpected appearance, stirring up conflicting feelings; Sam searches for the location of the fabled Forever Tree as a gift for his soon-to-be wife.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: The Forever Tree Pt 2 : With the day of the wedding only a day away, Grace realizes how much she misses her father. Meanwhile, the clock is running out on Sam's quest to find the Forever Tree.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: The Honeymoon : Cassie and Sam celebrate their honeymoon at a country winery, where they help their hosts deal with a dilemma. Grace encounters her first heartbreak and Abigail holds a joint fundraiser with Mayor Donovan

programme.title: Good Witch

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: The Tea : Cassie uses her magic to help two best friends reconnect. Martha is reinstated as mayor of Middleton and celebrates by commissioning a portrait of herself, and challenging Grace and Luke on the history of Middleton.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: The Road Trip : Cassie, Grace, and Abigail embark on a road trip to Cassie’s alma mater, Wellingsly College. There, Cassie reconnects with an old friend, who’s contemplating her future as a professor.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: The Grey-cation : Martha and her husband Tom arrive at Grey House for a weekend staycation…or Greycation. There, they engage Cassie and Sam in a couples’ party game – which causes Cassie and Sam to realize that they still have some things to learn.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: The Treasure : Martha discovers the original Middleton town charter, and soon learns that it holds clues to the location of a fabled treasure.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: The Comet : Middleton is abuzz with the arrival of a comet that appears once every hundred years. Cassie shares the secret of the comet… everyone in town gets a wish, but not all wishes will be granted.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: The Graduation : Grace and Nick’s graduation day has arrived, and Cassie pulls out all the stops to ensure that the occasion is truly magical.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Starting Over….Again : Cassie and Grace Nightingale do their best to welcome their new neighbors, but when they are met with resistance, they must use a bit of magic to help them embrace life in Middleton.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Apologies & Remembrances : As Cassie continues to be at odds with Sam, Grace experiences trouble with Nick Samuels when she is blamed for stealing her school’s mascot.

programme.title: Good Witch

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Andrew Rannells, Jill Kargman, Weird Food Combos With TikTok Chef Eitan Bernath : Drew is joined by “The Boys in the Band” star Andrew Rannells. Plus, Drew’s ex-sister-in-law actress Jill Kargman helps celebrate the first day of October. Then, Drew taste tests some weird food combos with 18-year-old chef and TikTok star Eitan Bernath.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Camila Alves McConaughey & Kay McConaughey, Comedian Paul Scheer : Camila Alves McConaughey & Kay McConaughey discuss working together on Women of Today. Hometown Bar-B-Que Billy Durney smokes up turkey and sticky beef ribs. Drew surprises a deserving mom of 3-year-old quadruplets. Paul Scheer co-pilots "Drew’s News."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Youtube Star David Dobrik, Comedian Fortune Feimster, Beauty Backgrounder : David Dobrik on amassing over 15 million YouTube subscribers and the Vlog Squad. Comedian Fortune Feimster stops by. in Beauty Backgrounder, Drew does a deep-dive into the history of iconic beauty looks and shares tips for perfecting the timeless look.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Neil Patrick Harris, Baking with Duff Goldman, Actress Michaela Watkins, Astrologer Aliza Kelly : Neil Patrick Harris on the inspiration behind Box One, an ever-evolving game that he co-created. Pastry chef Duff Goldman whips up chocolate peppermint cupcakes. "The Unicorn" star Michaela Watkins chats. Plus, celebrity astrologer Aliza Kelly.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Chris O’Donnell, Cooking with Geoffrey Zakarian, Dr. Aliza Pressman : "NCIS: Los Angeles" star Chris O’Donnell stops by to chat. Drew’s whipping up a cozy fall soup with accomplished chef Geoffrey Zakarian. Plus, psychologist Dr. Aliza Pressman joins Drew to help solve viewers dilemmas.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ben Platt, Samantha Bee, Design Backgrounder: Mid-Century Modern : Actor Ben Platt is joined by his sister-in-law former “Glee” actress Courtney Platt to discuss the new initiative MS IN Harmony helping patients achieve harmony of the body and mind through music therapy. Samantha Bee chats. Design week continues.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Nick Offerman, Fashion Tailoring, Mae Whitman, Kevin Frazier Oscar Nominations : “The Great North” star Nick Offerman stops by to chat. “Good Girls” star Mae Whitman joins Drew. Plus, in all new Drew’s News Drew and her co-pilot Ross Mathews are joined by Entertainment Tonight Co-Host Kevin Frazier to discuss Oscar nominations.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Catherine Zeta-Jones, Jennifer Nettles, Grandma’s Time Out : “Prodigal Son” star Catherina Zeta-Jones chats. Singer Jennifer Nettles discusses her new album “Always Like New.” Drew surprises a Grandmother of five, who just celebrated 50 years working as a Nurse’s Aide at the same hospital, in "Grandma’s Time Out."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Zach Braff, Donald Faison, Jamie Kern Lima, Wildflower : “Fake Doctors, Real Friends” podcast hosts Zach Braff and Donald Faison. Makeup mogul Jamie Kern Lima on building a billion-dollar business. In “Wildflower,” Drew spotlights women who have paved their own way to success such as mechanic Stephanie Wooster.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Wildflower: Model Winnie Harlow, Mom’s Time Out : Drew spotlights women in signature "Wildflower." Laura Sobiech and Director Justin Baldoni discuss her son Zach’s battle with cancer inspiring a number one song. In "Mom’s Time Out," Drew surprises one deserving mom with an all-expenses paid vacation!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Hailee Steinfeld, Hook In with Karamo Brown, Drew’s News : "Dickinson" star Hailee Steinfeld stops by to chat. "Queer Eye" culture expert Karamo Brown helps one viewer "hook in" and set up the right foundation before her partner moves in with her and her 16-year-old son. Plus, an all new Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Sarah Chalke, Roan Curtis, Brunch with Babs, Dear Drew with Heidi Gardner : “Eat Wheaties” star Sarah Chalke chats. "Firefly Lane” star Roan Curtis joins Drew and Sarah for Face The Fun Facts. Meet the grandma behind TikTok's Brunch with Babs, Barbara Costello, for breakfast casserole. “SNL's” Heidi Gardner joins “Dear Drew.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Craig Ferguson, The Bella Twins, #GrandGoals, Cooking with Chef Pilar Valdes : Craig Ferguson stops by. Niki & Brie Bella on their memoir. Drew introduces new seg "#GrandGoals," highlighting amazing grandparents out there and kicks things off with a grandma who just graduated college. Pilar Valdes whips up Tomatillo-Poblano soup.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew’s Never Have I Ever Hour, First Date After Divorce : It’s Drew’s Never Have I Ever Hour! Drew helps a viewer get ready for her first date since her divorce. New foods with Eitan Bernath. Then, we follow a couple as they go sky diving for the first time! Plus bonus moments with actress Charlize Theron.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Celebrating the Oscars with Entertainment Tonight Co-Hosts Kevin Frazier & Nischelle Turner : Drew celebrates the Oscars with Ross Mathews and “Entertainment Tonight's” Kevin Frazier & Nischelle Turner who will be covering Oscars history, fashion, predictions, and more! Oscar nominee “Borat: Subsequent Moviefilm's” Maria Bakalova stops by to chat.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: “Drew’s D-Cluttering” Show, Marie Kondo, Rachael Ray : It’s “Drew’s D-Cluttering” show! Drew is joined by tidying expert Marie Kondo who shares her tips for sparking joy. Then, Rachael Ray shares kitchen staples for a clutter-less kitchen. Plus, Drew surprises one single mom with a home office makeover.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Willie Geist, Summer Toys with 7-Year-Old Shirley Temple King Leo Kelly, Drew’s News : “Sunday TODAY” Host Willie Geist chats. 7y.o. Leo Kelly, aka The Shirley Temple King, joins Sr. Editor of The Toy Insider Maddie Michalik to test out the hottest toys of the summer. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews serve the news sunny side up in Drew’s News.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: 6 Hours : A Dallas billionaire's teenage daughter is kidnapped by a trusted ally: her bodyguard. It's a race against time as the Rangers attempt to locate the 17-year-old before her captor kills her and broadcasts the murder on the Web.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Medieval Crimes : Gage must dress as a knight and compete in a series of jousting matches when he goes undercover to catch a band of art burglars who work at a medieval-themed dinner theater.

programme.title: Coming Soon

programme.title: They Came Together

programme.title: I Could Never Be Your Woman

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show

Hearts may be broken. Can these couples survive the secrets that threaten to tear them apart? Find out on today’s MAURY!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: First Stop : The Ricardos and the Mertzes have a hard time finding accommodations that will please everyone on their trip to California. Ricky is driving and sacrifices his passengers' appetites for the sake of making mileage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Tennesse Bound : The Ricardos and the Mertzes are arrested when they're caught speeding in Bent Fork, Tennessee. Although Ricky just wants to pay the fine, Lucy protests that they are being treated unfairly.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel's Home Town : The Ricardos and the Mertzes, on the last leg of their NY-to-Hollywood motor trek, stop at Ethel's hometown of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Under the impression that Ethel has been called to Hollywood by the movies, the townsfolk give her the star treatment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: L.A. At Last : After five weeks on the road driving across the country, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive at their destination – Hollywood. With stars in her eyes, Lucy heads for the Brown Derby, a restaurant frequented by celebrities, with Ethel and Fred in tow.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Don Juan and the Starlets : Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Gets In Pictures : Lucy is desperate to appear in a Hollywood movie after hearing the Mertzes have bit parts in an upcoming feature. She sets out to be "discovered" and lands a part in an MGM musical. She plays a showgirl in a glamorous nightclub scene but has some trouble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Fashion Show : Lucy convinces Ricky to allow her to buy a Don Loper dress so she'll fit in with the Hollywood scene. Lucy and Ethel hit the couturier's salon but soon realize the dresses are way out of their price range.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Hedda Hopper Show : Lucy arrives in Hollywood with Little Ricky to meet her husband and his new press agent, who intends on making Ricky the "Cuban Liberace." Charlie Pomerantz plans a publicity stunt he hopes will get Ricky into Hedda Hopper's gossip column.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Don Juan Is Shelved : Lucy learns her husband's film Don Juan will be shelved and works frantically with the Mertzes and Mrs. McGillicuddy to prevent it from happening. Together they write hundreds of fan letters and dress up as members of the Ricky Ricardo Fan Club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Bullfight Dance : Lucy has agreed to write an article entitled "What It's Like To Be Married To Ricky Ricardo" for a magazine when she learns from Ricky's press agent that Ricky is going to host a TV show. Lucy desperately wants to appear on the show with Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Hollywood Anniversary : Ricky forgot the date of his 15th anniversary and desperately wires the records department in Greenwich, Connecticut where they were married to find out. In his defense, Ricky tells Lucy that he's already planned a big "surprise" anniversary party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Star Upstairs : Lucy learns a movie star, Cornel Wilde, is staying in the penthouse directly above the Ricardos' apartment and sets out to catch a glimpse of the handsome actor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In Palm Springs : Lucy and Ricky, and Fred and Ethel are fed up with each other's annoying habits and decide they all need a break. They split up for a brief vacation and Lucy and Ethel decide they'll go to Palm Springs for a girls-only good time.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Harpo Marx : Caroline Appleby is visiting from New York and is excited to see all the stars Lucy had promised. Of course Lucy exaggerated her access to celebrities but plans on fooling her nearsighted friend.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Dancing Star : Lucy's friend Caroline Abbleby decides she'll pay Lucy a visit while on her way to Hawaii, and can't wait for Lucy to introduce her to all the stars she has supposedly befriended. Lucy's only solution is to trick her friend and set the stage for deceit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Needs An Agent : Lucy decides that Ricky needs an agent to negotiate more money and cut down on his fruitless personal appearances, so she appoints herself. Her fast talking, no-nonsense actions result in the studio canceling Ricky's contract.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Learns To Drive : For their trip out west, Ricky buys a new car to replace the old, beat-up one Fred bought. Lucy convinces her husband to teach her how to drive it. After one driving lesson, Ricky is a harried and beaten man.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: California Here We Come : Lucy's mother wants to join the Ricardos on their road trip out west. As anticipated, Ricky blows his stack when he hears that Lucy's mother wants to go along, and continues to complain that everyone's going on the trip.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Reunion : A law school class reunion proves deadly for one of Matlock’s former classmates, and Ben takes on the defense of another old friend, George Dutton, the partner of the victim.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Umpire : Matlock attempts to defend Charlie Bonham, a softball coach who is accused of killing the umpire – who was also his boss – during the league’s playoff game.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Investigation (Part 1) : Matlock is surprised to learn that his long-time client, respected businessman Craig Gentry, is the son of mob boss Sam Gerard. The ace attorney must defend Craig of the murder of a senator who was investigating organized crime.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Investigation (Part 2) : Matlock has his hands full defending his client, Craig Gentry, while also trying to prevent a full-scale mob war from breaking out between Craig’s father and two of his enemies.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Hucksters : Matlock is hired to defend Hal Simpson, an irate investor accused of murdering Robert Ullman, the smooth-talking owner of Fountain of Youth Elixir Creams, who was really promoting a phony get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Lovelorn : When the popular writer of an advice-to-the-lovelorn column is murdered, Matlock discovers a house full of problems and suspects.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Genius : Ben Matlock’s nephew, Dr. Irwin Bruckner, is accused of murdering his boss, the director of a top-security think tank, and Matlock’s defense seems doomed to failure unless a master computer can be outsmarted.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Magician : Matlock discovers he has more than one tricky suspect to contend with as he tries to defend magician Daniel Fontaine who’s accused of murdering Sandy Farrell, his ambitious and unfaithful assistant.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Fisherman : Matlock takes on the defense of Nguyen Tran, a Vietnamese fisherman accused of murdering the town bully, a man who had been terrorizing Tran and his fellow countrymen.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Heiress : Matlock’s murder defense of Allison Tate, a young heiress with a history of mental instability, is complicated by Warren Kreitzer, a New York lawyer who is responsible for her trust fund.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Lemon : When Matlock’s neighbor, Les Calhoun, returns a malfunctioning used car he just bought, he becomes the prime suspect in the saleman's murder. Although circumstantial evidence points to a conviction, Matlock sets out to prove his new neighbor was framed.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Ambassador (Part 1) : When a British ambassador is accused by his lover, Shelby, of killing her husband, he refuses to hide behind diplomatic immunity and instead calls on Matlock to clear his name.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Ambassador (Part 2) : When someone tries to kill Matlock and the British ambassador he’s defending of murder, Matlock realizes that finding his client’s vanished lover and accuser, Shelby, is the key to identifying the real killer.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Mistress : Matlock suffers a series of mishaps when he tries to find a missing murder witness to clear his client, who’s accused of killing her philandering husband.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Genius : Ben Matlock’s nephew, Dr. Irwin Bruckner, is accused of murdering his boss, the director of a top-security think tank, and Matlock’s defense seems doomed to failure unless a master computer can be outsmarted.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Breakthrough : Galvatron has Sixshot start moving Cybertron towards the planet where Alpha Q's "soul" is. The Miranda II gets hit and crashes into Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Distribution : Optimus Prime and the other Autobots try to breakthrough the energon grid and then later have to go under ground

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Omega Train : The Autobots battle, but this time in cyberspace, a virtual training program. While Alpha Q watches from the sidelines, Six Shot hacks into the program and enables the Decepticons to play in the game.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Decepticon Army : The Autobots split up and with the help of other autobot rebels they attempt to find and free Kickers family and Cybertron. Galvatron gets Cybertron through the space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Ironhide Team : Kicker searches for his family below Cybertron, while Galvatron and a damaged Optimus square off on the planet's surface. Kicker is reunite with his mother and sister.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Formidable : Kicker's dad sabotages the energon gas grid from within enabling Optimus to get into the Command Center and Rodimus and Prowl waiting around Cybertron to get to the planet. The terrorcons got into the super energon and grow in size.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Galvatron Terror : Primus is still snoozing, Sixshot overloads the grid and causes a huge explosion that takes down most of the autobots, and Cybertron heads for Plains planet and destroys all the planets in its path.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Destructive Power : Sixshot convinces Mirage, Snow Cat, and Demolisher that Starscream will stay Galvatron's favorite if they do not do something about it, but when they head out Sixshot traps them and heads for the Superenergon.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Spark : Galvatron is growing and tethered to Cybertron by strands of Superenergon. Kicker and some of the Omnicons cut the strands. Ironhide and Scorponok battle, and Galvatron heads into space, but not towards Alpha Q's planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Sun : Big Galvatron vs Big Optimus Prime. Lots of little battles with all the others too. Kicker gets sappy with Misha before going to destroy Unicron's "puny" remains, but something's not quite right…

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Pilot- Part 1 : When a Cybertronian prison ship crashes on Earth, a new team of Autobots, led by Bumblebee, arrives to protect the planet -- and the galaxy -- from hundreds of escaped Deception fugitives!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Pilot - Part 2 : Following a mysterious message, BUMBLEBEE returns to Earth with unlikely companions to face a new Decepticon threat.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Trust Exercises : Bumblebee and his new allies struggle to find a teamwork dynamic as they protect Crown City from metal-devouring Underbite.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: More Than Meets The Eye : Bumblebee's new troop needs to hone their teamwork, but they'll have to do it on the fly as they face off against two more Decepticon fugitives – Sharkticon HAMMERSTRIKE and wolf-like STEELJAW.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: W.W.O.D.? : Fixit, craving the action of a field assignment, gets more than he bargained for when the Bee Team tries to keep wily Combiner CHOP SHOP from fleeing Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: As the Kospego Commands : Beleaguered Bumblebee must learn to lead in his own way as the team struggles to bring in the brutish Buffaloid, TERRASHOCK, whose stasis pod has been found by human scientists.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Collect 'Em All : Sideswipe's loyalty and dedication to the team come into question as he and Bumblebee track down THUNDERHOOF, a Decepticon taking advantage of human folklore.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: True Colors : Bee and his team track FILCH, a crow-like Decepticon with an impulsive urge to steal all things "shiny," who has taken Denny prisoner.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Rumble in the Jungle : Grimlock seems to turn against his friends, but the change of heart proves to have been caused by a miniature Decepticon taking control of his body and mind.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Can You Dig It? : Strongarm takes on her first "solo" mission - tracking the insane frog-like Decepticon SPRINGLOAD to the ruins of an ancient temple.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Adventures in Bumblebee-sitting! : The Bee Team welcomes visiting Autobot veteran JAZZ, just in time to fend off the massive Bot-worm PED – a petty crook bent on monopolizing Energon supplies.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Hunting Season : Infected by a Decepticon's toxin, Bumblebee regresses to the maturity of a youngster, leaving the team essentially leaderless, chasing an escaped fugitive, and trying to keep tabs on the hyperactive lieutenant.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Out of Focus : The Bee team finds itself caught in the middle of a feud between rival bounty hunters who are both out to claim a bounty on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Sideways : Bee tries to keep his team from distraction as they fight MALODOR and his Skunkticon posse, while Optimus, in the realm of the Primes, undergoes a dangerous test administered by MICRONUS.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Even Robots Have Nightmares : Sideswipe blackmails Strongarm into doing all his work while the team tries to capture crab-like CLAMPDOWN, jailed for the very same crime back on Cybertron, before he can join Steeljaw's Pack.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Some Body, Any Body : Denny and the Bots are captured by the bat-Decepticon NIGHTSTRIKE, who plunges the team members into their worst fears.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: One of Our Mini-Cons Is Missing : Mad-scientist VERTEBREAK captures Sideswipe, steals his body and stores the Autobot's head in a jar, leaving Sideswipe to think he's unable to contribute to the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Deep Trouble : After a dispute with his sensei, Drift, Jetstorm returns to Earth in the hopes of studying at the feet of a new master – Russell!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Champ : Bee and the Team head to the ocean floor to capture Decepticon OCTOPUNCH, not knowing that Grimlock is covering up a serious injury.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Trouble With Fixit : When Decepticon gladiator GROUNDPOUNDER and his cheating manager HEADLOCK enter a human Demolition Derby, Grimlock, Denny and Fixit pose as competitors to bring the 'Cons in.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Lock Out : An attempt to fix ailing Fixit goes horribly wrong, turning the Mini-Con into a fully weaponized and lethal prison guard who mistakes the Bee Team for Decepticon fugitives.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Similarly Different : After Steeljaw and his Pack commandeer the Scrapyard and its defense while the Bee Team is away, our heroes must find a way back in – or face an army of freed Decepticon prisoners.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Unwelcome Well : A ruthless oil tycoon is slain and the young geologist he betrayed is charged with the crime.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Dead Ringer : Raymond Burr plays a double role as both lawyer Perry Mason and as a Cockney merchant seaman in a plot to discredit Mason.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Misguided Model : A glamorous model is threatened and the showy figure who tried to wreck her career is murdered.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Positive Negative : A retired general heading a local cleanup commission is charged with murder when the community's crime boss is found dead.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Crafty Kidnapper : A columnist is slain and the witnesses who could absolve the accused refuse to testify.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Bogus Books : A thriving racket in first-edition books comes to light after a bookstore proprietor is found slain in a locked room.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Capricious Corpse : A young woman, attempting to rescue a charitable youth organization from predatory heirs, becomes involved in a murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Hateful Hero : Perry Mason defends a rookie policeman charged with both robbery and murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Dodging Domino : Perry Mason defends a university professor accused of murdering a blackmailing songwriter.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The Case of the Double-Entry Mind : A mousy bookkeeper embezzles $201,000 from his company only to be thwarted by his boss' beautiful secretary.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: Dr. Death: A License to Kill (Part 1) : For nearly two decades, Michael Swango, a physician-turned-murderer, left a trail of death and mayhem across two continents. Suspicious illnesses and deaths followed him from hospital to hospital.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: Dr. Death: You’re Next (Part 2) : For nearly two decades, Michael Swango, a physician-turned-murderer, left a trail of death and mayhem across two continents. Suspicious illnesses and deaths followed him from hospital to hospital.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Dating App Murder : Donal MacIntyre meets former DI Simon Shuttleworth to discover how Leicester Police captured the murderers of 45-year-old Timothy Smith, found fatally wounded in a crashed car.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Mistress Scorned : Donal meets former Met Detective Inspector Tony Bishop to discover how the fatal poisoning of Lakhvinder Lucky Cheema was solved.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: The Arson Murders : Renowned journalist Donal MacIntyre meets Detective Inspector Jim Hodgson of Lincolnshire Police to find out how he and the murder squad solved the brutal killing of Marina Erte.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: The Multiple Identity Killer : Renowned crime journalist and Criminologist Donal MacIntyre meets Detective Chief Inspector Andy Guy from Suffolk and Norfolk Major Investigation Team, to discover how he solved the extraordinary double murder of Peter and Sylvia Stuart.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Murdered for £20 : Donal MacIntyre interviews former Metropolitan Police Detective Chief Inspector Sue Hill to find out how she and her team cracked the murder of lawyer Tom ap Rhys Pryce.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Jeshma Raithatha : Donal MacIntyre interviews former Detective Chief Inspector Sue Hill to discover how she crossed Europe to bring justice to the family of murdered Jeshma Raithatha.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Stephen Lawrence : Donal MacIntyre interviews former Detective Chief Inspector Clive Driscoll to discover how his determination led to the capture of the men who had murdered Stephen Lawrence.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: The Grim Sleeper : The story of a manhunt, which lasted nearly three decades. How the killer identified and then murdered his victims…. And how the revolutionary science of DNA eventually led to his capture.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Toxic Web of Deceit : The story of the excruciating and sudden death of a healthy 60-year-old woman and how detectives traced the killer, despite their calculated and elaborate web of deceit.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Lured to Death : A killer stalks and gains his victim’s trust, and investigators keep the case open for almost two decades, until scientific advances allow them to bring the perpetrator to justice.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Triple Murder Mystery : The story of the murder of three unsuspecting victims and how, despite the killer’s meticulous planning, investigators were able to identify and link him to the crime.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: The Good Samaritan : The Good Samaritan is the story of a ruthless murder and how determined police work and sophisticated forensic techniques eventually solved the case.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Nightclub Nightmare : The story of Laura Garza’s murder, how her killer was identified and how, two years after her disappearance, investigators got the break they needed after her body was discovered.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: The Body in the Field : The tragic story of Mary Ann Perez, and how an extensive cold case investigation utilizing DNA advancements, was finally able to solve her random and horrific murder.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: American Pickers : Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Catch-32 : Mike and Frank have their work cut out for them on a huge property with more custom 1932 Fords than they have ever seen in one place; Danielle takes on an important military mission.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: American Pickers : Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Mother Load : Mike and Frank accept an invitation from Indiana's Model-A Ford lady and fall hard for her ultra-rare, barn-fresh Model-A tow truck.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: California Dreamin' : Mil Blair decides to sell some of his rare collections of motorbikes and memorabilia; Bird's temple of surfing; the guys get their new surfboards appraised at the California Surf Museum and make a generous donation.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Cammy Camaro : The guys stumble upon a staggering honey hole in Kansas; a couple's garage sale collection; Danielle learns that Frank's coin-operated motorbike is worth some serious money.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Real Knuckleheads : Frank falls hard for a Harley Davidson "knucklehead" at a collector's hidden California compound.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: What's Inside the Vault? : The guys go see a woman overwhelmed by an incredible inheritance, she opens the doors to a secret vault; they meet their match in an 80-year-old rebel who speeds a mini bike around his massive property.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Slim Pickings : A visit to a Kentucky property with a racetrack revives a rivalry between Mike and Frank; a stop in North Carolina looks like a bust until the guys unearth a one-of-a-kind TV relic.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Pickin' for the Fences : In Oklahoma, the guys uncover a baseball signed by one of the greatest players of all time.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Chevy Chase : The guys try to find a 1957 Chevy for a Pawn Star to be fixed up by the American Restoration team; Mike cooks up a plan to walk away with a fast food icon; the guys face two rounds of intense bidding when they finally track down a rusted-out Chevy.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Pick Your Battle : Mike and Danielle pick an over-the-top, tiki-party-meets-rockabilly home; Frank and Robbie set their sights on a vast collection hidden in the fortified bunkers of an old army base.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Empire Picks Back : Mike and Frank use the force to unveil a secret Star Wars stash in California; the guys try to make a deal on a mint '56 Chevy Belair.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Twin at All Costs : On a family compound in New York, Mike flips for a coin-operated elephant, while a collection of A-list mannequins leaves him speechless.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Big Boy Toys : Mike finds a retro boat and a BMW micro car in a California garage; the guys return to a radiator shop.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Texas Pick'em : Deep in the heart of Texas, Mike and Frank play a couple of hands of Texas Pick'em with some savvy collectors.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The Big Melt : The Hedgehogs vacation is interrupted by the news of Robotnik's latest weapon.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Sabrina The Animated Series

programme.title: Sabrina's Secret Life

programme.title: Sabrina The Animated Series

programme.title: Archie's Weird Mysteries

programme.title: Iggy Pop - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: Iggy Pop - Austin City Limits : The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.desc: Andrea Bocelli: Live in Tuscany : Vivere: Live in Tuscany is a concert performed by classical singer Andrea Bocelli.

programme.title: Paul Simon - Live in New York City
programme.desc: Paul Simon - Live in New York City : During the first leg of Paul Simon's triumphant, 2011 U.S. tour, he thrilled hometown fans with a special club performance at New York City's historic Webster Hall.

programme.title: Paul Rodgers - Free Spirit
programme.desc: Paul Rodgers - Free Spirit : The 16-song collection, 'Free Spirit', filmed in London, England returned Paul Rodgers to his roots, bringing fans an extraordinary evening celebrating the music of Free.

programme.title: Paul McCartney - A Musicares Tribute
programme.desc: Paul McCartney - A Musicares Tribute : The unmistakable Paul McCartney was honored as Person of the Year by MusicCares at a gala event that brought together several artists to celebrate the Beatles' victorious career.

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: James Brown : James Brown was an American singer, songwriter, record producer, dancer and bandleader. The founding father of funk music and a major figure of 20th century popular music and dance, he is often referred to as the Godfather of Soul.

programme.title: Aretha Franklin - Rock Legends
programme.desc: Aretha Franklin - Rock Legends : After a period at Columbia Records, Franklin signed to Atlantic Records in 1967, where she achieved her commercial acclaim and success with songs such as Respect, (You Make Me Feel Like) A Natural Woman, Spanish Harlem and Think.

programme.title: Depeche Mode - Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: Depeche Mode - Rock Am Ring : Rock Am Ring (Nürburgring), Rock Im Park (Nuremberg) is a music festival that takes place annually at the Nürburgring Race Track in Western Germany. Featuring Depeche Mode.

programme.title: Florence and the Machine - Live at Apple Music Festival
programme.desc: Florence and the Machine - Live at Apple Music Festival : TheApple Music Festival(formerly known as theiTunes Festival) was a music concert series held byApple, Inc.inaugurated in 2007.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Binky Wrestles with a Story/All Will Be Revealed : Binky spends the day with Bitzi Baxter and learns what it's like to be a news reporter. Then, D.W., Bud, and Rapty set out to solve the mystery of what really happened to D.W.'s snowball.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Making Conversation/A Cloudy Day : Talking to adults makes George want to hide! When he learns he must go to a grown-up party, he turns to his friends for help. Then, Arthur and his friends learn that old silent films can be just as much fun as the movies they’re used to.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Listen Up!/Arthur's New Old Vacation : When Francine's Bubbe passes away, Muffy tries to understand how she can help her friend. Then, when Arthur's family goes on the same vacation they take every year, he and Buster try to make it more exciting.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Blabbermouth/All Grown Up : Buster is hurt when he learns his friends don't trust him to keep a secret. Then, the gang finds a mysterious fortune telling game at the library and gets a hint of what their futures could hold.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Eyes / Francine's Bad Hair Day : For some reason, Arthur isn't doing very well in school anymore. Maybe he just needs some glasses? Problem is, Arthur hates having to wear them. And it's school picture day and Muffy is determined that Francine will look her best.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur and The Real Mr. Ratburn/Arthur's Spelling Trubble : It's the first day of third grade and Arthur's biggest fear has come true--his new teacher is the dreaded Mr. Ratburn. Then, it’s time for the all-school spellathon. Arthur is chosen to compete, and he finds facing Prunella and The Brain!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W. All Wet/Buster's Dino Dilemma : The Reads are having a wonderful time at the beach, except for D.W. who simply refuses to have fun. Next, Buster and Arthur make a long-awaited field trip to a dinosaur excavation.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W.'S Imaginary Friend/Arthur's Lost Library Book : Someone only D.W. can see has moved in with the Reads. Her name is Nadine, and she follows D.W. everywhere. Arthur is the first to get the new Scare-Your-Pants-Off book from the library. Unfortunately, he can't figure out where he put it!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Pet Business/D.W. The Copycat : How can Arthur prove to his parents that he's responsible enough to take care of his very own puppy? "Get a job," suggests D.W.!. Yet another personality change for D.W., who's decided that from now on, she'll be just like Arthur.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Locked In The Library!/Arthur Accused! : Arthur and Francine are fighting. But when they get locked inside the library they either have to make up or prepare for a long evening. And when Buster opens his detective agency, he has no idea his first job will involve Arthur.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Goes To Camp/Buster Makes The Grade : Arthur and his friends go to summer camp where it's strictly boys vs. girls. Next, Buster Baxter is everyone's favorite jokester. Unfortunately, though, Buster's grades aren't as good as his jokes, and Buster may have to repeat third grade.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's New Puppy/Arthur Bounces Back : Arthur's new puppy is exactly what he wanted. He's cute and wriggly, and he follows Arthur everywhere. But training a puppy is harder than Arthur thought. Then, a mere $10 stands between Arthur and the shoes he's been dreaming about.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Babysits/Arthur's Cousin Catastrophe : You think running a marathon is hard? Try babysitting for the Terrible Tibble Twins. Next, Arthur's family is hosting the once-a-year-is-more-than-enough family reunion. But a major thunderstorm turns this into a reunion to remember.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Birthday/Francine Frensky, Superstar : Only four more days until Arthur's birthday party! But to Arthur's horror, it turns out Muffy's having her birthday party on the very same day. And, now that Francine finally has the lead in a school play, she's has become a stage tyrant.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Baby/D.W.'s Baby : Arthur is not too sure he's ready for a new baby in the house. What do babies do besides cry? Then, living with a baby is no picnic. Just how long will Baby Kate be hanging around, anyway? And who would even miss D.W. if she ran away?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Writes A Story/Arthur's Lost Dog : Struggling with a school assignment, Arthur decides that his regular life is just too boring to write about. And, Arthur is the only one who believes in the superior intelligence of his dog. But even Arthur gets confused when Pal runs away.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: So Long, Spanky/Buster's New Friend : D.W.'s beloved bird gets very sick, and despite D.W.'s eager ministrations, Spanky dies. Can she risk giving her heart to another pet? Then, Buster doesn't have time for Arthur. And all he wants to talk about is a new friend named Mike.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur The Wrecker/Arthur and The True Francine : Arthur always seems to wreck things, and this time it's Mom's computer. Can he get it fixed before Mom finds out? Then, Muffy A. Crosswire and Francine are absolute best friends, despite their rather obvious differences.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Family Vacation/Grandpa Dave's Old Country Farm : What's got moldy bathrooms, lumpy beds and lots of rain? Arthur's family vacation. Then, Arthur and D.W. go to visit their grandfather, but the visit doesn't turn out as expected, because Grandpa Dave isn't your usual kind of grandfather.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur and The Crunch Cereal Contest/D.W. Flips : A year's supply of Crunch Cereal is in store for the person who can write the new Crunch Cereal jingle, and Arthur is sure he can do it. Next, how hard can it be to do a cartwheel on a balance beam? D.W. is about to find out.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Meek For A Week/Arthur, World's Greatest Gleeper : Muffy bets Francine she can't be nice to everyone for a whole week--and soon wishes she hadn't. Next, Arthur didn't mean to tell a lie, he just got stuck in a sort of fib, because he thought it was cool to be a Gleeper.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Chicken Pox/Sick As A Dog : The circus is in town and the whole family's excited—until Arthur gets CHICKEN POX! Will he recover in time? Then, Arthur's worst fears come true when poor, sick Pal has to sleep overnight at the vet's office. Could it be something he did?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W. Rides Again/Arthur Makes The Team : In D.W.’s heart lurks one big, gnawing desire--TO GET RID OF THOSE TRAINING WHEELS! Then, can Coach Frensky work with a baseball team where everyone is fighting about who gets to be pitcher and no one wants to practice?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Almost Boring Day/The Half-Baked Sale : It's raining and boy is it BORING! But then, in Grandma Thora's attic, Arthur and D.W. discover some really FASCINATING stuff about their parents. Next, Grandma Thora is helping to organize a bake sale, but her goodies aren’t very good.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Sue Ellen Moves In/The Perfect Brother : A new girl has arrived in town and no one knows anything about her. And judging by the strange things happening at her house no one wants to know. Then, it's great having a friend spend the weekend.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W.'s Snow Mystery/Team Trouble : D.W. saves everything. But her most prized possession is a snowball from last winter. But now it’s disappeared! Then, Arthur, Francine, and Buster must do a report on ancient Rome--but can they work as a team to complete the assignment?

programme.title: Snowpiercer
programme.desc: Snowpiercer : A post-apocalyptic ice age forces humanity's last survivors aboard a globe-spanning supertrain. One man (Chris Evans) will risk everything to lead a revolt for control of the engine and the future of the world.

programme.title: Vice
programme.desc: Vice : Gov. George W. Bush of Texas picks Dick Cheney, the CEO of Halliburton Co., to be his Republican running mate in the 2000 presidential election. When Bush becomes victorious, Cheney uses his newfound power to help reshape the country and the world.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: Red Dawn : After foreign troops seize control of an American town, a group of young people takes refuge in the surrounding woods and launches guerrilla attacks against the enemy.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: Kin : On the run from a Detroit crime boss, an ex-con and his adopted brother use a high-tech gun to battle an army of thugs and two heavily armored, futuristic soldiers who want their weapon back.

programme.title: The Giver
programme.desc: The Giver : A teen (Brenton Thwaites) discovers the dark truth about his community's secret past from an old man (Jeff Bridges) who is the sole keeper of their world's memories.

programme.title: Hatfields & McCoys: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Hatfields & McCoys: Bad Blood : When a Union soldier on his way home crosses paths with a family of Confederate supporters, a bloody feud erupts between neighboring families.

programme.title: Ender's Game
programme.desc: Ender's Game : After an alien invasion, an unlikely recruit commands Earth's forces and fights for the future of humanity.

programme.title: Mud
programme.desc: Mud : On a Mississippi River island, two young friends (Tye Sheridan, Jacob Lofland) encounter a fugitive (Matthew McConaughey) whose wild tales about a beautiful woman and a line of bounty hunters come true.
