programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Nowhere to Land : Pilots of TACA Flight 110 make a remarkable landing on a narrow levee, but investigators must find out why the engines in a brand-new plane failed.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Impossible Landing : A shocking look at the fate of United Airlines Flight 232 which crashed into Sioux City's runway in 1989 causing a subsequent explosion that left 111 people dead.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Lokomotiv Hockey Team Disaster : A Russian passenger jet crashes into the Volga River, killing almost everyone on board; the incident turns into a national tragedy when rescuers discover the plane carried some of the country's famous athletes.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Double Trouble: TransAir Cargo Flight 671 : After an explosion rips both engines off the right wing, the pilots of Transair 671 manage a landing at a French military airfield.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Icy Descent : After experiencing icing conditions, a turboprop slams into an Argentine desert; investigators are mystified by what they uncover.

programme.title: The Accident Files
programme.desc: Dead of Night : A look at disasters where darkness played a role.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: The Final Push : Investigators try to find the cause of two similar air crashes that happened nearly 12 years apart.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Dead Tired : In the worst U.S. crash in more than seven years, a Buffalo-bound flight stalls and plummets into a suburban home in 2009.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Explosive Touchdown : After touching down, a Taiwanese commuter plane is rocked by a massive explosion, but investigators find no evidence of a bomb on board.

programme.title: The Accident Files
programme.desc: Poor Piloting : A look at accidents caused by errors in the cockpit.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Cockpit Failure : Minutes before they're scheduled to land in Zurich, the pilots of a routine passenger flight can't find the runway; they abort and power up the engines in order to climb, but they are too late.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: No Warning : Investigators must figure out why the safety systems of a turboprop plane failed to prevent a crash into an Indonesian mountain.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: No Clear Options : When a commuter turboprop plane crashes at an Irish airport, investigators uncover a startling gap in aviation safety.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Tree Strike Terror : In November 1995, American Airlines flight 1572 clips the tops of trees along Peak Mountain Ridge and strikes an instrument landing system antenna at Bradley International Airport in Hartford, Conn.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Deadly Mission : A new investigation sheds light on the controversial 1961 plane crash that killed U.N. Secretary-General Dag Hammarskjöld.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Surprise Surprise! : Maci turns 25, Farrah deals with a challenging employee, Tyler celebrates Butch's important anniversary, and Matt's troubled son arrives as Amber tries to clear up nasty rumors.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Party in Portugal : Sam makes a big decision when the squad are told they're off to Portugal. The family live their best lives on the Algarve, but tension between Bethan, Beau and Abbie threatens to boil over. (S20, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Agg on the Algarve : Bethan and Abbie's row impacts on the house, and it all kicks off when Nat calls Bethan and Beau's relationship 'toxic'. The Geordie's get stuck into the Sangria and tear up the strip!

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Jason's Birthday : Lauren races home from an all-day Teen Vogue event to be with Jason on his birthday, but the night doesn't turn out as she expected. Audrina seeks Heidi's advice for her latest date with model/actor, Danny.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Boyfriends and Work Don't Mix : Jason becomes a mounting distraction in Lauren's professional and academic life. Heidi finally gets her big chance to work in the nightclubs, but it couldn't have come at a worse time.

programme.title: The Osbournes
programme.desc: 28 Days Later : Kelly struggles to adjust to life in rehab, and frequently calls home requesting various personal belongings.

programme.title: The Osbournes
programme.desc: Charity Case : Sharon and Kelly plan a trip to Kenya on behalf of a charity organization.

programme.title: The Osbournes
programme.desc: Number One Fan : A 25-year-old fan wins a charity auction for the right to spend the day with Sharon.

programme.title: The Osbournes
programme.desc: Lozt in Translation : The family travels to Japan, where Ozzy is to receive the Legend Award at the Video Music Awards.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Jenelle : North Carolina beach bunny who loves partying realizes her long-distance boyfriend isn't coming back, and that she's too immature to raise a baby herself.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Nikkole : Nikki is half prankster, half princess, whose posse of friends adore her but hate her disrespectful, trouble-making boyfriend Josh. Can she convince her friends and family that Josh is worthy of being a father to their son?

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Chelsea : Popular senior is caught up with her school life and fighting with her boyfriend Adam. She thinks things will go back to normal after she gives birth, but instead learns that she can choose her daughter above everything else.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: The Ties That Bind : Amber and Matt lay down strict rules for their houseguest, Farrah prepares her newest business, Maci enjoys her bridal shower, and Catelynn and Tyler's anniversary is marred by tough news.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Ginger's Last Binger : Maci and Taylor party in Las Vegas, Catelynn explores equine therapy, Amber and Matt meet with a writer to set the record straight, and Farrah's conflict with Debra hits a boiling point.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Cray Gardens : Catelynn and Tyler face a setback with the new house, Farrah and Debra continue to feud, Amber steps in to help Gary and Kristina, and bride-to-be Maci hosts a family dinner.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Fun at the Fair! : The squad return from Portugal but Sam has left the house which leaves Chloe thinking it's over. The family go radge at Newcastle's biggest funfair. Beau and Bethan make it official.

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Geordies Do the Great Outdoors! : Chloe visits Sam and they make progress in their relationship. The squad go camping, and get attacked by midges. James decides to tell Sam about Chloe's kiss in Ibiza. (S20, ep7)

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Somebody Always Has to Cry : It's the gang's first Holiday in LA and not everyone gets what they wish for. A New Year's kiss proves hard to come by for Lauren when Jason finds out she got an unexpected call from an old flame.

programme.desc: You Can't Just Be With Me? : Jason wants to make Lauren's 20th birthday special but when she lies to him about working with male models for a Teen Vogue assignment their relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: Are You The One?

programme.desc: Duplicity : Loyalty is tested in a volatile new partnership. Agents must put their intel skills to the test while in a lava tunnel during "Mission: Drone Control." A stunning battle in The Crater causes ripples that will impact numerous Agents.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Skyfall : After one Agent is unexpectedly deactivated, TJ institutes a shocking security breach, which shakes up partnerships. The Agents compete in "Mission: Agent Down" where they must overcome their fears of heights. A group of strong Rookies align.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: From Theresa With Love : When rumors spread about Theresa's loyalties, she quickly becomes public enemy number one. A pair of strong Agents find their partnership struggling during the arduous "Mission: Smuggle Run."

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Die Another Jay : Fallout from a shocking blindside puts a target on a strong pair of Agents. Devin presses an Agent's buttons, resulting in another night of mayhem. Agents must face their fears while hanging off of a helicopter during "Mission: Aerial Takedown."

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: A Muddy Matter : Aneesa and Olympian Lolo Jones get into a heated exchange during the muddy "Mission: All Brawl." CT starts to worry about his partnership with Big T. Amber M becomes suspicious of one of her closest friends in the game.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Lady Vengeance : One Agent is put on blast after trying to appease both her alliance and her new group of friends. TJ forces the Agents to participate in his favorite game, trivia, during "Mission: Interrogation." Old grudges resurface, as two rivals go head to head.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Kim & Matt : Kim's been pouring her heart out to Matt for over 10 years. Now, Kim's facing a life-changing decision - should she marry her current boyfriend or find out if Matt is her soul mate?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Antwane & Tony : Nev and Max are contacted by Carmen who is sounding the alarm on behalf of her cousin, Antwane. He's been in a 3-year romance with a man named Tony that he met on a telephone chat line.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Miracle & Javonni : Smart, single mum Miracle fell for Javonni, a dreamy-eyed Instagrammer. With Max on hiatus, Nev teams up with TV personality Charlamagne to take Miracle on a hunt for the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Antoinette & Albert : A year after meeting 'T-lights' on Instagram, 'instaceleb' Antoinette is ready to meet him, but he always brushes off the idea. Is he really the online celebrity he claims to be?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Courtney & Isaak : Courtney broke up with Isaak, who she met online. He's doing everything to get her back. Beauty queen Cassidy Wolf joins Nev to get Isaak to leave Courtney alone for good.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jarrod & Abby : How do young people who've embraced the digital age find love? Often by connecting online with others they've never met in person before. The problem -- that cute guy you may be falling in love with could be lying about who he really is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Tyler & Amanda : After a year and a half of chatting with her online, Tyler thinks he may have a future with Amanda. But are Tyler's friends correct because they suspect that something isn't right?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Harold & Armani : Harold found his match with a beautiful fellow jock named Armani. Although they live in the same area, they've never met. Nev is joined by Angel Haze to help Harold get his perfect girl.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Tracie & Sammie : Tracie Thoms had a connection with a fan named 'Sammie' after hearing about the passing of Sammie's friend. Sammie suddenly disappeared and now Tracie is left wondering who Sammie really is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Trina & Scorpio : Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Lauren & Derek : Lauren met Derek online years ago. Derek is caring, supporting Lauren after she had a baby with a former boyfriend. Lauren thinks Derek could be the one, so why has he avoided meeting her?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Ramon & Paola : Ramon met Paola on Facebook and established an exclusive online relationship. But after many failed attempts to video chat, is she really who he thinks she is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Solana & Elijah : Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Cassie & Steve : Cassie was on a downward spiral until she got a friend request from a rapper named Steve. Two and a half years later, Cassie and Steve are engaged - but they have yet to meet.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Blaire & Markie : When Blaire's Instagram lover Markie broke her heart, she moved on. But now Markie is back and wants to meet. Blaire needs Nev and Max's help to make it happen and reveal Markie's secret.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Daisy & Marcus : Daisy met Marcus on Instagram and he instantly stole her heart. But Marcus won't speak to Daisy on the phone, let alone meet her in person, so Nev and Tyler try to arrange a face to face.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Miranda & Cameryn : After years of online chats Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be. She confronted him only to be given another suspicious profile. Is he someone else entirely?

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: The Dingo : Action sports personality The Dingo joins Rob in breaking down Pain Angels, Worst Case Scenarios and things That'll Cost You. And you'll never guess what happens when a heavy lifter loses control.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Matthew Mounce : Rob, Steelo, and Chanel laugh till it hurts at Unnecessary Combos, people who should Stay out of the water, and others who just plain wonder Who Put That There? Karate expert Matthew Mounce helps break down some Bad Karate.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jeff Tremaine : Producer Jeff Tremaine joins Rob in breaking down what it means to Lawnchair and Slam and Sprint. Some kids start slamming young in Ridiculousness in Training, and Rob points out Your Friend's a Dick.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Matt Schlager : Beauty Queen Caite Upton joins Steelo on the panel. Rob breaks down the magic of Man-kinis and Dodging Bullets. Guest Matt Schlager demonstrates how to fall with your face first and hands second, in Getting Schlagered.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chris "Drama" Pfaff : Rob's cousin Drama helps Rob break down Family Dysfunction, Your Friend's a Dick, and Little Rollers. Credit Cards compete for pain against Popsicles. And learn whether Parkour is an art or just some Aggressive Running.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Judd Leffew : Bull rider Judd Leffew schools Chanel on whether bulls get dizzy when Rob breaks down A Bunch of Bull and Angry Animals. Watch fools compete in the Ridiculousness Decathlon. And a whole lot of people get Dunked.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Biker Fox : Caite Upton joins Steelo once again as Rob shows off S**t Whips and Redneck Good Times. A lot of people blow out their money-makers in De-Faced. Biker Fox joins the panel for some fun in spandex and scrapes in Biker Down.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Ryan Dunn : TV star Ryan Dunn joins the fun as Rob points out the problems with Lower Education. See some folks who are clearly Out of Your League while others get slammed in That's What You Get and Let Me Help You Hurt Yourself.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Dan Heaton : Rob breaks down Why Rollerblading Should Make a Comeback. Witness a merry-go-round of pain in Worst Case Scenario, Almost Made It and Not Even Close. And guest unicyclist Dan Heaton shows off some Uni-Psychos.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Cole Hernandez : Learn How Not to Treadmill and why Grass is Your Friend. See a wake of damage after Trees Strike Back. Guest dancer Cole Hernandez brings some Weird Dancing. Some skaters get Racked. Rob narrates Chicken Police.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: The Dingo II : The Dingo is back! Laugh as a whole lot of people have a Tough Day on the Job, find out if You're Too Old For That, and who's Almost Awesome. Rob breaks down Skiers vs. Snowboarders. Shoes go flying off in Shoe Down.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Big Black II : Big Black is back and he's showing off Black Lavender. See what happens When Bad Ideas Go Worse and people suffer a Failure to Launch. Rob's got a special category that only comes once: You Couldn't Do That Again if you Tried.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Justin Bieber : Justin Bieber stops by the set to show off some of his Canadian pride, learn about Humanimals and what Popcorning is really all about.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Floyd Mayweather : Floyd Mayweather visits the Ridiculousness studio where Rob shows him what a Pain Face looks like. They'll also endure some Romantic Injuries and learn How Not To Train.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Sara Jean Underwood : Former "PMOY", Sara Jean Underwood, visits the Ridiculousness set where Rob shows off his Fear Face and they talk about how Cats are Weird.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Quinton "Rampage" Jackson : UFC fighter & former champion, Quinton "Rampage" Jackson, shows his wolf battle cry and what really sets off his Hot Button. Rob also shows videos of Crappy Endings and what it's like to get Slampaged.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Duff Goldman : Ace of Cakes star chef, Duff Goldman, stops by set with a scorpion cake and we see some of his Unnecessary Costumes. He and Rob also show videos of Grand Entrances and Ghost Holes.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jason Ellis : Australian-born actor and radio personality, Jason Ellis, shows us he is an expert at Showing Off Gone Wrong when the introduction of Tramp Stamp videos earns him a surprise payback from Chanel.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling : Rob and co-hosts, Chanel and Sterling, breakdown the fun of Redneck Good Times and introduce new categories: Random Tackles, Animal Revenge, Dropping Loads, and many more.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Streetbike Tommy : Rob dedicates Whisky Throttle and Bear Trap videos to Nitro Circus stunt man, Streetbike Tommy. Tommy also tells us why you should always Bring Your Own Chair.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Lil Jon : Lil Jon and Rob enjoy the "Yeah" category inspired by the rapper, watch videos of Dancing Animals, unintentional Body Shots, and people getting Fenced.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Tyler and Taco : Tyler, the Creator and Loiter Squad co-star, Taco, visit the set of Ridiculousness and learn about Sloppy Finishes and Faceballs.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Wiz Khalifa : Wiz Khalifa - Rapper, Wiz Khalifa, guest stars where he'll discuss with Rob why Grass Is Your Friend and the joys of Human Magnets. The fan-favorite, Makeshift Thrill Rides, returns to the show.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Kat Graham : Actress and musical artist, Kat Graham, shows us some of her big moments of One-Liners and how to dance on stage with one shoe. Rob also shows videos of her Magical Spells.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Vaughn Gittin, Jr. : Drift racing super-star, Vaughn Gittin, Jr., reunites with Rob to watch videos featuring Faulty Equipment and High-Speed Chaos. Rob introduces instant classic categories such as Flailers and Stunt Dummies.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chris Cole : Rob shows the audience how to Escape Your Pain while friend and pro championship skater, Chris Cole, learns what it's like to be in the Hot Seat.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Big Cat : Rob's cousin and Fantasy Factory co-star, Scott Pfaff (AKA Big Cat), comes to the studio so he and Rob can demonstrate why Birds Are Dicks and how to Get Froggy.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Bella Twins : Guest stars WWE Twin Divas, Nicole and Brianna, stop by the Ridiculousness set to show us some of their Backyard Wrestling moves and how to make the perfect Pain Angel.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling II : Rob, Chanel, and Sterling "Steelo" Brim educates the audience on how to Save Your Drink, why Safety Hurts sometimes and sees some "Chanels-In-Training"

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: TJ Lavin : BMX rider and MTV host, TJ Lavin, stops by to learn about Flinstoning, Shirtless Manplay, and Animal Prodigies.

programme.title: Ridiculousness

programme.title: River Monsters

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Amazon Titanic : Supreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to South America to hunt for a seriously gargantuan fish found in the dark depths of the Amazon River.

programme.title: River Monsters

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killer Weapons : Jeremy Wade recalls his many battles against dangerous water creatures, and the techniques and weapons he used to survive these encounters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Untold Stories
programme.desc: Lethal Legends : Do underwater creatures with grasping hands stalk children in Japan; and is a murderous river spirit wreaking havoc on the Zambezi? Jeremy Wade investigates.

programme.title: River Monsters

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killer Sharks & Rays : Jeremy Wade relives some of his most dangerous catches.

programme.title: River Monsters

programme.title: River Monsters

programme.title: River Monsters

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 9 : The team takes on a treacherous challenge battling rapids before spending the night in a cave.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 10 : It is the last day of competition between the girls and boys. Meanwhile, on the survival menu today: raw locusts.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 11 : The final exercise is to reach the summit of Moel Siabod and spend the night out alone.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 12 : The kids have been airlifted by helicopter into the Welsh mountains; after a night out alone, they are hungry and exhausted, but the only food on the menu is wild squirrels.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 1 : The master of survival teaches ten young students how to cope in the wild. First, they head to a remote island where they must fend for themselves overnight.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 2 : Day two sees the competition heat up as the camp splits into two teams: girls versus boys.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 3 : The survivors face a terrifying trust exercise and later learn about camouflage.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 4 : On day four, the students tackle their first mountain in North Wales and get a rude awakening.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 5 : The would-be survivalists face a daring jump from a hovering helicopter into an ice-cold quarry.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 8 : The students are determined to prove their bravery when a huge storm hits the camp.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 9 : The students attempt a 'panther crawl' across a raging river, before building a shelter.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Survival School
programme.desc: Episode 12 : Bear's pupils wake from a less-than-restful night's sleep and must pull together as a team to ensure they cross the final obstacles between them and the summit of Mount Cnicht.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Secrets & Lies : A woman asks for Dog's help catching a fugitive and getting him back on the straight and narrow.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Mano-a-Mano : Back in Colorado, Dog goes on the hunt for a runner with a criminal history; with the fugitive's friends and family reluctant to help Dog bring him in, Dog knows he has a family feud on his hands as he tries to bring the felon to justice.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tent City : Dog heads to Oahu's ramshackle tent cities, searching for a woman who has lost almost everything; with no known address and only tips from questionable sources, Dog heads out to bring her to justice and try to bring hope back to her life.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dead of Night : Dog gets a late-night lead on a difficult case with Chris' business at stake.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cats and Dogs : Dog only has a few days to either catch a woman nicknamed "Cats" or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond; the fugitive is pregnant, so Dog tries to talk her into surrendering without a fight.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby's Back in Town : Dog looks forward to his daughter moving back to Hawaii with a grandchild he has never met; trick tried to nab fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Twisted Love : A team attempts to catch a woman accused of aggravated car theft with the help of a dog and by using her girlfriend as bait.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tears for Fears : Lyssa Chapman finds herself in a jail cell with no recollection of how she arrived there.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Family Man : Dog hopes to keep his record of capturing fugitives on his birthday intact by reeling in a felon struggling with drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The Hunt for Santa : The Chapmans prepare for a family gathering to celebrate the holiday season and members of the posse reflect on their highlights from bounty hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.desc: The Montrose Files: The Million Dollar Man : Dog helps a small-town bondsman with a million-dollar bounty.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Command Central : Qatar represents everything a modern military command post; it can be with the most sophisticated military information systems--from video-conferencing to real-time frontline satellite communication.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Strategic Air Command : At the height of the Cold War, the Strategic Air Command controls thousands of nuclear weapons, planes and missiles.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Under Pressure : Every aspect of live involves pressure; it's what puts the bubbles in soft drinks, propels shaving cream from its can, cools the contents of your refrigerator, and causes volcanoes to erupt; but rapid pressure changes can be as violent as explosions.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Modern Marvels: Super Power Pressure : Blowing the lid off the many uses of pressure, including keeping a fridge cool, and making volcanoes erupt.

programme.title: Firefighting!
programme.desc: Extreme Conditions : Extreme firefighting techniques must be used to quell blazes from oil wells, war, forest fires and airplanes.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Extreme Aircraft : The X-1 jet breaks the sound barrier; the X-43 Scramjet flies at Mach 7; U-2 and SR-71 Cold War spy planes; flying Wing bombers; the new F/A Raptor.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Bridges : From amazing ancient Roman aqueducts and arch bridges, romantic Renaissance spans, 19th-century railroad crossovers, to monumental marvels of our time, bridges played a key role in the human quest to connect and unify.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: New York Bridges : Much of New York City's history can be viewed via its bridges, all 18 that connect Manhattan Island to its neighbors; the episode looks at these architectural masterpieces from the age of iron and steel and show how they have changed destinies.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Casino Technology : An exciting spin through the history of the casino going behind the neon lights, free drinks, and 24-hour gambling to see how the gaming industry has evolved from a simple house of cards to a high-tech multi-billion dollar industry.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Survival Technology : A historic survey of adaptation to killer environmental conditions travels to the desert, Arctic, sea, jungle and space, charting the body's physiological responses to extreme circumstances such as frostbite, heatstroke and hypothermia.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Harvesting : Cutting, digging, picking, stripping, shaking, and raking--whatever the crop, there's a custom machine to harvest it; it all began with handpicking and today it's often one man and one machine harvesting hundreds of acres in a single day.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Harvesting 2 : America's orchards and farms balance hand labor with mechanization through efficient harvesting methods; explore orchard management, California's largest fruit packing house, Nebraska corn fields, Wisconsin cranberry marshes, and more.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Oil : From the first well in Pennsylvania to the gushing Spindletop and modern supertankers, the story of oil is the story of civilization as we know it; a look at the ingenious and outrageous men who risked a lot for "black gold" and unimaginable wealth.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Secrets of Oil : Rubber, plastic, nylon, aerosols, resins, solvents, and lubricants, none can exist without oil; the secrets of oil and the many products it has spawned; oil refinery in California; chemical weapons suits; making asphalt; blending jet fuel; Vaseline.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Command Central : Qatar represents everything a modern military command post; it can be with the most sophisticated military information systems--from video-conferencing to real-time frontline satellite communication.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Strategic Air Command : At the height of the Cold War, the Strategic Air Command controls thousands of nuclear weapons, planes and missiles.

programme.desc: Reality Trip: Part 2 : From Butch Hartman, the creator of the hit Nicktoon The Fairly OddParents, Danny Phantom is the animated action/comedy story of 14-year-old Danny Fenton, who uses his razor-sharp wit and amazing ghost-like superpowers to transfo

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Double Cross My Heart : After Vlad sends three ghosts to Amity Park to battle Danny Phantom, we find out that he's working on his creepiest project yet: a clone of Danny Phantom.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Kindred Spirits : Danny won't admit his jealousy of Sam's new crush, Gregor. Instead he convinces himself that Gregor is an undercover operative for the Guys in White.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Eye for an Eye : Danny and Vlad's game of revenge against each other begins with childish pranks, and, unfortunately for Danny, ends when Vlad decides to run for mayor of Amity Park!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Infinite Realms : Danny helps pull a thorn out an abominable snowman-like creature who presides over the chilliest area of the ghost zone. To show his gratitude, Frostbite reveals to Danny the Infi-Map, a map of all the secret worlds.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Girls' Night Out : Kitty, Ember and Penelope Spectra are sick of the ghost-men in their lives, and they're going to do something about it by making all the men of Amity Park disappear. Except Danny and Jack are on a fishing trip!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Torrent of Terror : Amity Park is in the midst of a drought, and Mayor Vlad, eager to score points, releases Vortex, the weather ghost, to make it rain.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Forever Phantom : There's a new ghost in town - Amorpho, who can become anyone he sees. He decide to switch with Danny but when their powers collide, it makes a mess of things!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Urban Jungle : Undergrowth, the ghost of all things plant-like and vegetative has taken over Amity Park - and turned everyone into plants. Danny must develop a new power to save Amity Park.

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Livin' Large : The Guys in White have finally caught on: Jack's a genius, how could they have not seen this before? They offer Jack and Maddie millions for FentonWorks and before you can say "movin' on up" -- right next to mayor Vlad!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Boxed Up Fury : The Box Ghost is tired of being unappreciated as a terrifying ghost. Frustrated, he turns to the box belonging to Pandora, and every time he opens it he unleashes a new evil on the town!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Frightmare : It's a whole new world for Danny Fenton – he's getting A's, he's the quarterback of the football team, he and Tucker are best pals with Dash, and Sam is his girlfriend. What? Turns out it's all a dream!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: Claw of the Wild : Danny, Sam and Tucker go camping in a creepy, run-down dump. Before everyone can adjust to their surroundings, Mikey runs in claiming a monster in the woods snatched his friend!

programme.title: Danny Phantom
programme.desc: D-Stabilized : Danielle Phantom is back! Only this time, she's being hunted by Valerie whose been tricked by Vlad Masters into thinking the ghost girl is evil.

programme.title: Danny Phantom

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Scorpion's Sting : When Tigress discovers she's ill, Po and Monkey set out to obtain the only known cure, which is protected by the evil Scorpion.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Sticky Situation : After Po accidentally destroys the training hall, he seeks the help of the creator, Taotie, only to discover he's no longer a friend of kung fu... but an enemy!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: The Princess & the Po : When Po is asked to bring a young princess to the King of the Qidan to make a peace offering, they learn that an agreement between the two kingdoms will come at a cost.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Chain Reaction : After the Croc Bandits steal Shifu's favorite ruby-encrusted statue of Oogway from Po and Tigress, the two warriors must team up to get the statue back and return it home.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Fluttering Finger Mindslip : When Po learns a kung fu move that can erase someone's short-term memory, he takes it too far.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Rhino's Revenge : When a rhino comes to the Valley of Peace seeking to destroy the Dragon Warrior, Po tries to befriend him before he discovers Po's true identity.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Owl Be Back : After Po unleashes an "impossible move," he's told that the most powerful fighter in the Valley of Peace always turns evil, and that's him!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Sight For Sore Eyes : After Po disobeys Shifu's orders, the Hierarchy of the Sacred Onyx Council replaces Shifu with a new master who banishes the Furious Five and plans to destroy Shifu.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Hometown Hero : When Mantis returns to his hometown claiming to be the Dragon Warrior to impress his ex-fiancé, Po pretends to be his sidekick who doesn't know kung fu.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Challenge Day : Shifu tells the citizens of the Valley of Peace that whoever can defeat Po before sunset will become the new Dragon Warrior. When Hundun hears of the challenge, he returns to the village to claim the title.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Good Croc Bad Croc : After Po gets trapped in a hole, Fung helps him out and is owed a favor. Will it be a costly one?

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Po Fans Out : To impress his fan club, Po releases the Mongolian Fist Demon. Now he has to figure out how to defeat the Demon and save the village and his fans!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Legends of Awesomeness
programme.desc: Bad Po : Po disobeys Shifu's orders and looks into the Mystical Mirror of Yin and Yang, creating two versions of himself: one good and one evil!

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Unnatural Disasters : A veteran artist returns to take the competition by storm, a difficult Flash Challenge exposes the artists' weaknesses, and the artists tag-team an Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Lend Me Your Ear : The competition intensifies when the artists are tested on technical application, and two veteran artists make their returns.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: War and Ink : Some shops lose their composure during a grueling color realism Elimination Tattoo, and a difficult canvas threatens one shop's spot in the competition.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Get the Flock Outta Here : The competition intensifies as another veteran artist returns, and artists must take on the ultimate test of artistry as they freehand their Elimination Tattoos.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: On the Bubble : One of the competition's most infamous veterans returns to shake up the game, and the pressure is on when the artists are tasked with a new-school Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Masterpiece Mayhem : An emotional Flash Challenge brings the artists to tears, and the alliance becomes a target when a bulletproof pair of veterans returns to battle it out for the title.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Pin-Up Panic Attack : The artists can't find relief in a sculptural Flash Challenge, and in honor of one veteran artist's return, the artists must team up to tackle the infamous pinup tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Drill Baby, Drill : The final veteran artist's return sparks an old rivalry, the shops struggle to work together during a woodworking Flash Challenge, and artist Tommy Montoya is a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Grim Inker : A massive twist in the Elimination Challenge sends the artists reeling, and Four Horsemen tattoos bring the end of days for one pair of artists.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Pit Fall : The artists must tackle painful coordinating armpit tattoos, and Chris Nunez and Oliver Peck take charge of doling out canvases to the artists for the Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Sell Out : The six remaining shops must use their sales skills to win over the canvases for the chance to tattoo, and the judges send one more shop packing.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Casting the First Stone : The artists create cohesive designs by painting nude models in the Flash Challenge, and some shops miss the mark on an Asian deity-themed Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Marathon to the Finale : The final four shops battle it out in a tattoo marathon for a spot in the finale, a chance at $200,000, and the first-ever title of Master Shop.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Shop Wars Finale : In the live finale, the final three shops compete for $200,000 and the first-ever title of Master Shop.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Pick Your Side : Three of the most skilled Ink Masters return to coach teams of the nation's top tattoo artists for a chance at $100,000 and the title of Ink Master.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Fill 'Er Up : The Masters must coach their team through the season's first Flash Challenge, and a maze Elimination Tattoo puts the artists' grasps of the fundamentals to the test.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: SacTown Going Down : Jon -- joined by rapper T-Pain -- is in Sacramento, CA, to convince Kings fan Chris he needs to change his sports bar concept if he's ever going to make money.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A Silver Dollar Saved, Is A Silver Dollar Earned : Jon heads to the Silver Dollar in Chula Vista, CA, where the unresolved tensions between the father and son owners have led to operational issues and neglect.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Raging Turkey : Jon does reconnaissance at Kalaveraz Cocina-Cantina in Escondido, CA, and finds an owner so in over his head that he's resorted to not paying his staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In the Rough : Jon heads to Pepe's Mexican Restaurant & Cantina in Canyon Lake, CA, to help a once-bustling bar that's now a ghost town and open the disconnected owners' eyes.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Fear and Molding on Pineapple Hill : Jon goes to Orange County, CA, and attempts to revitalize Pineapple Hill Grill, a neighborhood bar whose owner's hands-off approach puts patrons at risk.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Bottoms Up, Going Down : Jon drops in on the lively Bottoms Up Bar and Grill in Stanton, CA, to teach the owner's son how to manage a rowdy atmosphere while still keeping patrons happy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The Mother of All Failures : Jon heads to Phoenix to help the owner of The Armadillo Grill get her business back in order as she desperately tries to pay back her father, but faces $450,000 of debt.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Not Your Godfather's Speakeasy : Jon attempts to save the legendary Las Vegas speakeasy Capo's Restaurant and bring it back to its pre-pandemic glory.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Two Tickets to Paradise Cantina : In his hometown of Las Vegas, Jon rescues a beloved party bar that blames their downfall on the pandemic until Jon discovers the truth.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Every Rose Has Its Thorn : After running a successful floral business for two decades, owner Randi thought she could parlay that success into a budding new bar. Unfortunately, she never rose to the occasion.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A Twice in a Lifetime Opportunity : In his second-ever re-rescue, Jon Taffer returns to Champagne's Cafe to help the struggling bar survive the pandemic and maintain its Las Vegas legacy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Rookie of the Beer : Jon Taffer must save an ambitious but rookie family-run brewery that was forced to open during the pandemic.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Viva La Casona : For his 200th rescue, Jon rescues a family who bought a Mexican restaurant at the height of the pandemic and put their daughter's future on the line to chase the bright lights of Vegas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A Bar to Take Pride In : An historic gay bar in Las Vegas is on the verge of closing after losing all of its entertainment options due to the Covid-19 pandemic.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A Commander & His Post : Jon heads to Pahrump, Nevada to save a VFW hall from permanently closing its doors and to help its commanding officer step away to take care of his ailing wife.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Behind the 8 Ball : A premiere billiards hall in Las Vegas is at risk of closing after it's owner struggles to recover from the effects of the pandemic...and his inept manager.

programme.title: Dogs With Jobs

programme.title: Sky Cops

programme.title: Sky Cops

programme.title: Sky Cops

programme.title: Homicide: Hours to Kill

channel.display-name: The Dog Whisperer with Caesar Millan

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Buddy and Stewart : A dog barks all the time and might pose a threat to children; a beagle mix has lots of strange behaviors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Daisy and Sophie : A herding dog likes to bite the noses of horses; a family struggles with a dog who runs out the door as soon as it is opened.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Lucy and Lizzie : Cesar helps Lucy, an odd dalmatian who is affectionate one minute and angry the next and Lizzie who is obsessed with running all the time.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Raging Bandit : Cesar has his hands full with a Labrador that is obsessed with water and a Chihuahua with a penchant for biting legs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Pig vs. Pug : A human psychologist calls Cesar for help when her pet pug and pet pig fight; an emotionally scarred German shepherd.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Devil Dog : A dog with a dark side has a knack for stalking and killing small animals; a poodle chases cars; a bulldog has an adverse reaction to skateboarders.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Doggie Jekyll & Hyde : A rescued dog is too ferocious; an insane Great Dane upsets a household; playing matchmaker for a lonely but picky boxer.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar's Worst Bite : Holly, a Labrador puppy, displays severe food aggression; a women's shelter will take a needy woman and her pit bull, Tucker, but Cesar must help the dog become less protective first.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Nunu and Kane : Chihuahua is a pint-sized peril to its owner's roommate; slobbering Great Dane afraid of shiny floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Flirt and Opie : A charmer around people, Opie becomes aggressive around other dogs; Flirt the Chinese Crested is hyper and neurotic.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Ruby and Rana : A vizsla with a biting problem is afraid of everything; a Shetland sheepdog barks at household appliances.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Josh and Boomer : Josh, a Maltese-poodle mix, won't let anyone go near him with a brush; Boomer, a clownish dog, must always be the center of attention.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Harry and Brooks : Harry goes crazy at anything on wheels; shadows drive Brooks crazy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Sueki and Coach : Cesar tries to help a boxer named Coach before he is put down for biting someone; Sueki turns her nose up at leads.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Slick & Pepper : Cesar tries to help Slick a fear-ridden dog who was rescued after living in a crate for 15 hours a day and Pepper, another rescue dog with issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Gus and Ava : Ava, a small mixed-breed spins constantly; Gus, a large dog who greets people by throwing its body at them.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Churchill and Maya : Churchill is usually a well-mannered dog, but around other animals he's a monster, and lovable pit bull Maya can be a handful.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Bubba and Garrett : Cesar takes the spoiled Bubba down a notch; discover why German shepherd Garret never stops chasing his tail.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Emily : Emily, the pit bull, is sent to doggie boot camp because she is so quick to attack other dogs that her owners can no longer walk her.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Scrawny and Lola : Scrawny is the favorite dog in his household, but popularity has gone to his head; Lola the dalmatian is spoiled.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Canada On Strike : The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Best of Both Worlds (Part 1) : Responding to a distress call on one of the Federation's outer-most colonies, the Enterprise arrives...only to find a big hole in the ground where the town used to be, and discovers the Borg are behind the attack.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Best of Both Worlds (Part 2) : Commander Riker had no choice as acting captain but fire full force on the Borg starship, despite Picard being on board of it, altered to a Borg calling himself Locutus, both ships are damaged.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Family : After defeating the Borg, the crew of the Enterprise experiences shore leave in various ways. Captain Picard's return to his family's vineyard in France has some extraordinary repercussions following his time spent as a member of the Borg collective.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Brothers : After an accident aboard the Enterprise leaves one of its children in grave danger, Data commandeers the Enterprise, driven to take him to an unknown origin, where an interesting figures awaits.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Suddenly Human : On a rescue mission to an alien shipwrecked training mission, they discover one of its trainees to be a human.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Remember Me : Dr. Crusher's fear of losing loved ones becomes real when her worries create an alternate reality.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Legacy : The crew of the Enterprise enters into orbit around the home planet of their former crew-mate, Tasha Yar, where they encounter her sister.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Transfigurations : The Enterprise finds a deserted planet where a ship has crashed, and, with it, the lone survivor with no memory, but extraordinary healing powers.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Best of Both Worlds (Part 1) : Responding to a distress call on one of the Federation's outer-most colonies, the Enterprise arrives...only to find a big hole in the ground where the town used to be, and discovers the Borg are behind the attack.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Legacy : The crew of the Enterprise enters into orbit around the home planet of their former crew-mate, Tasha Yar, where they encounter her sister.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Is There In Truth No Beauty? : Miranda Jones, a telepath who studied mental disciplines on Vulcan, arrives with Ambassador Kolos, a Medusan.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Spectre Of The Gun : When coming to a xenophobic isolationist planet, Captain Kirk and his landing party are punished for trespassing.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Day Of The Dove : When the Enterprise brings aboard Klingon prisoners, an alien entity pits both sides against each other in an ever-escalating struggle.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: For The World Is Hollow And I Have Touched The Sky : At the same time McCoy discovers that he has a year to live, the U.S.S. Enterprise encounters the asteroid Yonada which is determined to be artificially propelled.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Tholian Web : Kirk is trapped in interphase, while the Enterprise is trapped by a powerful energy web.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Plato's Stepchildren : After Dr. McCoy helps the leader of a planet populated by people with powerful psionic abilities, they decide to force him to stay by torturing his comrades until he submits.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Wink Of An Eye : Hyper-accelerated aliens, invisible to the naked eye, take over the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Empath : On a planet doomed to destruction, Kirk, Spock, and McCoy become involved with two aliens who use them as laboratory animals in a bizarre series of tests on an alien empath who may be the savior of her planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Elaan Of Troyius : The Enterprise must escort an alien princess to her marriage to seal an interplanetary alliance. In their journey, she becomes attracted to Kirk.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Whom Gods Destroy : Kirk and Spock deliver medicine to an insane asylum where a former Starfleet captain is being held. They discover that he has freed the inmates and is running the place.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Let That Be Your Last Battlefield : The Enterprise hosts two alien beings from the same planet who share an intense and self-destructive hatred of each other.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Mark Of Gideon : Kirk beams down on a diplomatic mission. He finds himself on an Enterprise where all the crew has vanished, and only a mysterious woman resides.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Tholian Web : Kirk is trapped in interphase, while the Enterprise is trapped by a powerful energy web.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Plato's Stepchildren : After Dr. McCoy helps the leader of a planet populated by people with powerful psionic abilities, they decide to force him to stay by torturing his comrades until he submits.

programme.title: Nash Bridges
programme.desc: Nash Bridges : Don Johnson is Nash Bridges, a San Francisco police investigator who deserves his reputation as the city’s top cop. Nash relies on his instincts, a keen sense of humor and a lot of charm to work his magic on the streets of San Francisco.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Is "Maria" Real? A Big Surprise For David Pt. 2 : David says he's in love with "Maria", a Christian woman from Texas with a $10 million inheritance. Even though they've never met, he's paid $25,000 to their lawyer to assist her in receiving her inheritance. Dr. Phil investigates "Maria": real or catfish?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Our Lying Ex-Boyfriend Is The Next Dirty John Pt. 1 : Tiffany says her relationship with her son's dad, Erik, was destroyed by constant lies & empty promises; she cut him off completely. Erik admits he's lied to his ex-girlfriends. Same with Sheka, who stopped wedding plans. Will more women come forward?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Falsely Accused Mothers? : Stacy and her boyfriend are accused of burning her 3-year-old daughter with cigarettes. What will lie detector tests reveal? Plus, Christina's mother has called CPS on her four times for allegedly abusing her grandson. Are Christina's kids in danger?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Beauty Queen Hits Rock Bottom : How did 21-year-old Jenna go from being a straight-A UC Berkeley student and former beauty queen to abusing heroin and meth and used as sexual currency in a drug house? Her mom is desperate to save her only child and turns to Dr. Phil for intervention.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The Disappearance Of Jennifer Dulos : The disappearance of Connecticut mom of 5, Jennifer Dulos has captivated the media. Dr. Phil's team of experts analyze circumstances surrounding her disappearance, including Jennifer Dulos' estranged husband, Fotis, & his girlfriend, Michelle Troconis.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meddling Moms : They track your every move and monitor your conversations. This may sound like the latest GPS locator, but they are actually meddling moms!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dirt, Lies And The Internet : Dr. Phil investigates a popular new website that dishes the dirt on non-celebrities. On creator Nik Richie's controversial site, TheDirty.com, people anonymously submit photos & negative comments about anyone in their community, tabloid style.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Our Daughter Is Raising Our Grandson In A Filthy Death Trap : Fred & Cynthia say daughter, Crystal, is raising her young son in a death trap! No running water, leaky ceiling, exposed wires, smoking electrical sockets, mice & mold! They are ready for CPS. Crystal says her home is a visible form of how she feels.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Child With A Child : Every parent can tell you that raising a child is often demanding, thankless, hard work. But when a teenager gets pregnant and has a child, the result can be stress and chaos.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brandon Returns : One of the most asked about guests on Dr. Phil returns--Brandon! Plus, a desperate family turns to Dr. Phil to save their daughter who is addicted to OxyContin and heroin.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The Husband, The Wife And The Mistress Pt. 2 : Jenaye comes face-to-face for the first time with the woman her husband, James, slept with on their fifth wedding anniversary. The woman, Chelsey, who is also James's former hairstylist, tells her side of the story. Will Jenaye believe Chelsey's claims?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pregnant And Abusing Drugs: The Ultimatum Pt. 2 : Dr. Phil continues with pregnant teen, Sara, who says she’s not addicted--her sister is a bad influence. Dr. Phil learns she and sister Sadie did cocaine the night before the show. Dr. Phil shows video of addicted babies and issues an ultimatum. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Twisted Love Pt. 1 : Can a man introduce another woman into his marriage and form a healthy, "triangular" relationship, in which he is shared by his wife and his mistress? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heroin In Suburbia: A Town Intervention : Heroin use among America's youth is plaguing some of the most prestigious & safest suburban towns. Dr. Phil sheds light on Simi Valley, CA, where residents are fighting a heroin epidemic. Dr. Phil talks to teens., parents & meets with Mayor Bob Huber.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A Woman Claims To Be Pregnant For 3 Years 7 Months : Pregnancy is a time of baby showers, nesting, indulging food cravings and being pampered. But Dr. Phil’s guests, Shayna, says she's been pregnant more than a year, and Zona, says she's been pregnant over 3 1/2 years, Both are looking for answers why.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: An Abusive Father Or A Delusional Teen: Who Is Telling The Truth? Pt. 2 : Tensions run high in this father/daughter battle conclusion. McKinley, 18, confronts her dad for allegedly being "abusive" in her childhood & a "pedophile," claims he denies. Dr. Phil questions Cory on an incident leading to Cory's sexual battery arrest.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The Student And The Professor: Is One Stalking The Other : Dr. Phil tries to unravel the truth in a toxic relationship between a student and a professor. Did they cross the line? Will they take responsibility for their roles in this ill-fated acquaintance?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My Husband's Cheating Went Viral Pt. 1 : When Jenaye posted an emotional video online about uncovering her husband James's infidelity she never imagined it would go viral. Discovering James slept with his hairstylist on their fifth anniversary, Jenaye says divorce might be the best option.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The Weekly Hot List : Caroline Flack presents a feast of unseen moments and the very best of last week's action from the villa, featuring plenty of flirting, fighting, romance and juicy gossip.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : The impending recoupling is all anyone can talk about. The islanders play a devilish game of truth or dare. Chloe stirs up some drama between Mike and Olivia.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : The recoupling leaves Olivia tearful and torn between two guys. Chris calls out Mike on his behaviour. The latest challenge leads to some saucy revelations.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Episode 14 : The love triangle between Chris, Olivia and Mike intensifies. Jonny and Camilla show off their sexpertise. Montana has a chat with Sam, but is he really listening?

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Episode 15 : The islanders are left reeling when Caroline drops a bombshell. Mike makes a play for both Chloe and Amber. Will Olivia finally decide between Chris and Mike?

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : Jessica and Mike's unexpected departure leaves the islanders - especially Dom and Olivia - in shock. Gabby chats to Amber about her feelings for Marcel as Olivia and Chris get back on track. Two new arrivals look set to shake things up.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : New arrivals Tyla and Simon waste no time in getting to know everyone. Are the cracks starting to show in Kem and Amber's relationship?

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The Weekly Hot List : It is time to catch up on an action-packed third week in the villa, with loads more unseen action and all the best moments crammed into one jam-packed hour.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : It is now week four in the villa, and as the islanders swelter in the summer heat, the flirting, dating and daily dramas continue.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : The couples face off in the Brits Abroad challenge. Amber grows jealous over Kem and Tyla's flirting. A shock double dumping rocks the island.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : There is tension in the villa after Sam and Chloe's dumping last night. As a surprise recoupling is announced, the boys question if they are in the right couples.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Episode 21 : There is tension in the villa following Dom and Jonny's fall out. As night falls, a shock dumping is announced. Whose time in paradise has come to an end?

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : The boys are sent packing just in time for Caroline to arrive at the villa with six new guys in tow. Meanwhile, five new girls arrive at the boys' new pad.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Love Island : The two villas compete in a game of sexy charades. Craig hopes to woo Camilla. Montana gets close to Alex. Kem tries to decide between Amelia, Danielle and Chyna.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Against All Enemies : Harm, Mac and Bud board an aircraft carrier in the Sea of Japan to investigate the accidental shooting down of a North Korean civilian airliner by Navy jets.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Impact : Harm and Bud investigate the crash of a Marine helicopter whose dead pilot is being blamed for the incident. They discover the chopper seems to have been hit by some form of UFO. Government security officials want to maintain a cover-up at all costs.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: People V. Rabb : Harm is arrested by the FBI for the murder of Konaplanik, a Russian who was selling Harm supposedly accurate information about his missing father's whereabouts. The killer turns out to be Col. Tomashevsky, a Russian agent.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Defensless : A woman Navy ensign shoots and kills a Turkish colonel; she claims self-defense.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: With Intent to Die : With help from Harm, Mac, Harriet, and Bud, Admiral Chedwiggen investigates the apparent suicide of his mentor, Admiral Clancy, who allegedly shot himself while on a hunting trip. Harm and company ultimately uncover who the killer was.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Father's Day : Mac and Harm are assigned the task of defending a young Marine whose frustration at being unable to wrest custody of his son has led to his being court-martialed for dereliction of duty.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Tiger, Tiger : Harm takes Josh on a weekend cruise for Navy families aboard a frigate. When the frigate is taken over by terrorists who intend to fire missiles at Cuba, Harm and Bud take matters into their own hands to stop the evil plot.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The Imposter : Harm is held captive by Palmer, a renegade government agent with whom he had crossed swords a few months ago. While Palmer prepares a life mask so he can pass for Harm, he explains his plans to assassinate the key witness in the trial.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The Return of Jimmy Blackhorse : An Army forensic pathologist joins forces with Harm, Mac, Bud and Harriet as they try to verify that newly unearthed human remains are those of a heroic Navajo "code-talker" who had been missing since WWII.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: To Russia With Love : With evidence that his missing father could still be alive in, Harm convinces the Admiral to give him time off so he can go to Russia. In Moscow, they are questioned by Mark Falcon, the KGB agent who had stolen a list of POW's earlier from Harm.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Gypsy Eyes : Unable to lose the pursuing Russian fighters, Harm's and Mac’s hijacked Mig is shot out of the sky over Siberia.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Act of Terror : When Arab terrorists attach a mine to a US Navy warship in an attempt to sink it, Marine guards are able to kill one and capture the other, even after the mine explodes, killing two sailors.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The Black Jet : Harm and Mac are sent to Teheran, Iran to represent a Navy flier whose Stealth jet crashed in Iran due to a major mechanical failure.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Silent Service : Mac and Harm are having trouble relating...a result of working together under stress for so long.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: King of the Greenie Board : Harm is now a Tomcat division commander aboard the carrier USS Patrick Henry that is patrolling the Mediterranean near Yugoslavia.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Rules of Engagement : The Russians are furious over the killing of their peacekeepers and the Navy sends Mac, Brumby, and Roberts to the Patrick Henry to conduct the court-martial of Lt. Buxton.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Savoir Faire : As members of the team investigate the death of an Afghanistan soldier training in the U.S., they find two other soldiers are missing. Sam is back on the team but some wonder if he is ready.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Fighting Shadows : After a successful sting, an explosion claims the lives of three FBI agents. Kensi and Deeks realize their secret is out.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Blaze Of Glory : When a missile test is hijacked and sent off course, the team searches for the hacking group responsible for the attack with the help of a tech guru Hetty brings in to assist the team.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Rage : Callen and Sam go back to their undercover identities as a prisoner and a guard to get inside a white supremacist group that might have stolen nuclear material.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Beacon : A former acquaintance -- presumed to be a murder victim -- makes a shocking reappearance to ask Callen and Sam for help.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Field Of Fire : The team looks for an unstable former Marine -- who is an expert sniper -- when his connection to an extremist group is revealed. Kensi is reminded of her past.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Kolcheck, A. : Callen and Sam are left with pressing questions to answer as they investigate a number of unexplained deaths on the missing oil tanker used in Arkady's deal with Russia.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Chernoff, K : The team tries to locate their suspects during an eventful trip to Moscow. At the same time, Callen learns more about his father.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Active Measures : Callen takes on a secret project, leaving the team in the dark; when Hetty shuts down Callen's operation, the team must locate him before he gets in trouble.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Citadel : When DEA Agent Talia Del Campo's (Mercedes Mason) partner is murdered, she turns to the team for help; Kensi thinks Deeks is hiding something.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Driving Miss Diaz : The NCIS team investigates a Peruvian massacre that occurred 20 years ago after it learns that a fashion model, who may have survived the incident, may now be in danger.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Command & Control : Callen and Sam mysteriously receive a cell phone and the caller threatens the lives of innocent people if the two don't do exactly what he says.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Blame Is On Rio : NCIS special agent DiNozzo partners with the NCIS: Los Angeles team to search the city after his prisoner escapes custody on a flight from Singapore to L.A.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Unspoken : Sam's former partner, Ruiz (Anthony Ruivivar), goes missing while purchasing a dangerous explosive during an undercover operation.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: An Unlocked Mind : Kensi and Deeks pose as cult members in hopes of rescuing a former Department of Defense employee who was persuaded to reveal classified information.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: The Long Goodbye : The team searches for Jada (Ella Thomas), the woman Sam led to asylum in the United States four years ago, after she goes missing. Also, Kensi goes undercover with DEA Agent Talia Del Campo (Mercedes Mason)
