programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: High High : The team go into a school of creative arts to investigate heavy drug dealing that could close the school if it isn't stopped.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Blinded by the Thousand Points of Light : The team hits the streets to find a predator that is preying on young hustlers.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Next Victim : Hoffs and Booker investigate a car bombing directed at a bigoted and controversial college radio talk show host.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Loc'd Out: Part 1 : Hanson, Hoffs, and Ioki go undercover to try to solve a series of drive-by shootings between two gangs.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Loc'd Out: Part 2 : Hanson is suspected of killing a crooked cop who was responsible for Ioki's shooting.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Draw the Line : Unsatisfied with the final outcome of the case, Booker reopens his last investigation.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Say it Ain't So, Pete : After a series of beatings, Hanson and Penhall go undercover in a popular college bar.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Eternal Flame : Hanson goes undercover in a night club suspected of selling drugs.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Come from the Shadows : Penhall, Hoffs, and Ioki investigate a Catholic university priest who is suspected of selling Salvadorian babies to finance an underground sanctuary movement.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: God is a Bullet : Penhall and Hoffs go undercover in a rough school to solve a drive-by shooting.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Old Haunts in the New Age : Hanson and Penhall go into a high school to investigate an arsonist.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Out of Control : After a series of burglaries in an upscale area, Hanson infiltrates a group of thrill-seeking kids. Meanwhile, Penhall and Ioki join a private security firm.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Stand by Your Man : Hanson and Hoffs investigate a group of med students suspected of stealing drugs from the hospital pharmacy.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: Mike's P.O.V. : Hanson and Penhall go undercover in a high school after a teacher and his wife are shot at in front of their home.

programme.title: The Long Riders
programme.desc: The Long Riders : Four theatrical families of the 1980s re-create the saga of the 1860s James Gang: Stacy and James Keach, David, Keith and Robert Carradine, Randy and Dennis Quaid and Christopher and Nicholas Guest.

programme.title: Under Fiesta Stars
programme.desc: Under Fiesta Stars : Gene Autry and a spirited gal jointly inherit a ranch and mine. When crooks inquire, she wants to sell, but Gene wants to work the mine. It takes Gene's charm and talent for her to see things his way.

programme.title: Man of the West
programme.desc: Man of the West : Screen legend Gary Cooper demonstrates why he will always be remembered as one of the most authentic stars of the screen. Capable yet vulnerable, Cooper's portrayal of a former outlaw whose past returns to haunt him ranks among his very best.

programme.title: The Old West
programme.desc: The Old West : Gene Autry tames and sells wild horses to a stagecoach line. His only competitor ambushes and shoots Gene, who is nursed back to health. A wild stagecoach race to test Gene's horses is arranged.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks
programme.desc: The Missouri Breaks : Marlon Brando and Jack Nicholson ignite the screen in this rousing story of a wealthy Montana rancher who hires a professional killer to track down a gang of horse thieves.

programme.title: Sam Whiskey
programme.desc: Sam Whiskey : Welcome to America's Wild - and very wacky - West! Burt Reynolds, Clint Walker, Ossie Davis and Angie Dickinson star in this tongue-in-cheek tale of love, lust and larceny as an amiable con-artist is hire by a sexy widow to break into the U.S. Mint.

programme.title: Blue Canadian Rockies
programme.desc: Blue Canadian Rockies : Gene Autry encounters mayhem on a dude ranch in the heart of timber country. When a Mountie is murdered, Gene and Pat Buttram must find the real culprit and bring peace to the Blue Canadian Rockies.

programme.title: Whirlwind
programme.desc: Whirlwind : Gene Autry arrives in Red Bluff to work on the investigation of mail robberies. U.S. Bonds are stolen, and Smiley finds burned fragments of them. A henchman confesses who the guilty party is.

programme.title: The Last Round-Up
programme.desc: The Last Round-Up : Gene Autry is a cattle rancher determined to protect the interests of neighboring ranchers and Indians against unscrupulous land manipulators when local authorities plan to build an aqueduct.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Hot for Teacher and Writing a Wrong : The Conner clan copes with life in Lanford in a way they never have before.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Sex, Lies and House Hunting : Darlene loves the house she's looking at, but when the realtor says she has a chance of getting the house if she's part of a couple, she convinces Ben to pretend to be her partner.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Triggered : The family is locked down in their home due to a shooting incident in the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Messy Situation, Miscommunication and Academic Probation : When Becky outs her relationship with Professor Davis, it's his erratic behavior that sends Becky down a path to reevaluate their relationship.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Gas Pump, House Dump and Stew Volcano : Darlene searches for a home that she and Becky can afford; after an attempt to boost business at The Lunch Box goes awry.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Big Negotiations and Broken Expectations : Dan enlists the help of a few friends for the funeral-home remodel; Louise points out that Dan's generosity with his time benefits everyone but her.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Best Laid Plans, a Contrabassoon and a Sinking Feeling : Darlene struggles to cope with the stress of construction; Lou returns as Mark's combative contrabassoon teacher.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Three Ring Circus : Ben and Darlene are excited to share their good news with the family, but Neville and Jackie, and Aldo and Harris, share their own very similar news.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Judge and a Priest Walk Into a Living Room… : The Conners gear up for a megawedding; Jackie & Neville, Darlene & Ben, Harris & Aldo are planning for a big day, but discover that some of the couples may not be on the same page.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Double Honeymoon and Seeing Double : In an effort to save money, Darlene and Ben, and Jackie and Neville head off on their joint honeymoon, where their cost-saving measures contribute to a tension-filled getaway.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Scenes From Two Marriages: The Parrot Doth Protest Too Much : When Jackie moves in with Neville, he shows up to their home with an excess of animals from his vet office; Darlene and Ben argue Darlene is turning into her father.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Driving, Dating and Deceit : Mark is anxious to get his driver's license; Darlene attempts to teach Mark to drive, but her frantic energy sends him running to Ben for help; Harris meets a new guy online.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Parent Traps and Heart Attacks : When a relative passes away unexpectedly, the family must debate about who should gain custody of a jaded nephew, who is just shy of his 18th birthday.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Little Weed and A Bad Seed : Problems arise on Beverly Rose's first day of kindergarten; Becky and Darlene have a disagreement; Harris advises an unusual solution for Dan's back pain.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Book Bands and Guillotine Hands : The Conners grapple with parenthood, dating, financial pressures, aging and in-laws in working-class America.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Take This Job and Shove It Twice : Darlene receives a promotion, but she quickly learns the fancy title is not all it's cracked up to be; when Louise loses her job at Casita Bonita, an opportunity arises.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Of Missing Minds and Missing Fries : Jackie must come to terms with her mother becoming ill; Darlene's job hunt proves to be more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Crumbs and Couch Surferes : Darlene, Ben, Becky and Beverly Rose move into the new house, where Darlene implements a new set of rules.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Dog Days of Christmas : Dan meets his in-laws for the first time when Louise's family comes to visit; Darlene helps Becky with a parenting problem.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Two More Years and A Stolen Rose : The death of a beloved teacher from Dan and Jackie's high school brings old classmates together; Becky asks Darlene and Ben for a big favour.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Stuck in the Middle and Stuck in the Past : Darlene and Ben get into a fight and ignore Becky's boundaries in the house; Dan accuses Jackie of losing all of their home videos.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: New Pipes and Old Secrets : Darlene has issues with Dan's plumbing work in her new house; Jackie tries to find a caregiver for Bev.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Adding Insult to Injury : Darlene continues her search for a new job; Becky is desperate to spend more time with Beverly Rose.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Possums, Pregnancy and Patriarchy : Harris makes a big announcement; Ben is overwhelmed with family responsibilities.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Hiding In and Moving Out : Harris takes her anger out on Darlene; Dan and Louise spend an entire day in bed together.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Contra Hearings and the Midnight Gambler : Mark fights for a spot in the Lanford High chamber orchestra; Jackie puts a lottery machine in the Lunch Box.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Road Trip and Guilt Trip : Dan and Jackie take a road trip to a hardware wholesaler in Oklahoma; Darlene heads out of town and leaves behind a plethora of to-do notes for Becky and Ben.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Text Thread and Marrital Bed : Louise gets into a feud with Becky after accidentally sending a rude message in the family text thread; Darlene tries to spice up her sex life with Ben.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: What's So Funny About Peas, Love and Understanding? : Darlene figures out a new plan to afford Mark's college tuition; Jackie and Louise try to help Becky meet a new guy.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dating, Drinking and Grifter Logic : Neville confronts Jackie about loaning Dan money; Darlene attempts to play matchmaker for Mark.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Grad Finale : As Mark's graduation approaches, he considers his relationship with his father; Louise plans a big graduation ceremony at the Lunch Box.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Keep On Truckin' : A sudden turn of events forces the Conners to face the daily struggles of life in Lanford in a way they never have before.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks : Ash meets some students, who are bullying their classmate Joe. Joe insists the rough treatment is necessary so he’ll be strong enough to graduate. Ash doesn’t agree.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Bulbasaur and the Hidden Village : Completely lost, our heroes reach a village not shown on their map. This quiet place is inhabited by Pokémon that have been injured in battle or abandoned by their Trainers.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Charmander – The Stray Pokémon : As our heroes press on toward Vermilion City, they encounter an injured Charmander, sitting atop a stone on a mountain pass. They later find out why it is waiting there.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Here Comes the Squirtle Squad : Ash and his friends walk along a path and fall into a hole dug by a group of mischievous Squirtle. Why is the Squirtle Squad such a menace to the local population?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Mystery at the Lighthouse : The party meets Bill, a Pokémon researcher who is waiting in his lighthouse for the coming of a one-of-a-kind Pokémon, never before seen by humans. Could such a Pokémon truly exist?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Electric Shock Showdown : Eager to earn a badge, Ash challenges Lt. Surge. Pikachu reluctantly enters the battle, only to discover that its opponent is a Raichu, a fierce Pokémon with tremendous electric power—and the evolved form of Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Battle Aboard the St. Ann : Ash and his friends board the cruise ship St. Anne, thanks to tickets provided by Jessie and James in disguise. Their latest plan is to lure Pokémon Trainers onto the ship and steal their Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Pokémon Shipwreck : A powerful storm forces everyone except Team Rocket and our heroes to abandon the sinking St. Anne. Ash, Brock, and Misty must team up with their enemies to survive this sticky situation!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Island of the Giant Pokémon : As our heroes and Team Rocket beat the odds by surviving the sinking of the St. Anne, they are dragged into another perilous situation when they are attacked by the Pokémon, Gyarados!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Tentacool & Tentacruel : When a group of Tentacool interferes with the construction of a hotel, a woman offers a reward to anyone who can repel them. However, our heroes are forced into action when Team Rocket’s ploy fails spectacularly!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The Ghost of Maiden’s Peak : Our heroes arrive at a small port town, in the middle of celebrating a summer festival. To recover from their hard journey, Ash, and his friends decide to relax and enjoy the festivities.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Bye Bye Butterfree : When the party sees a group of Butterfree flying above the Ocean, Ash decides to release his Butterfree. After being rejected once, can Ash’s Butterfree win over the heart of its pink sweetheart?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Abra and the Psychic Showdown : The party finally arrives in Saffron City, where a young girl commands a Pokémon Gym with her psychic powers. If Ash defeats Gym Leader Sabrina, he will earn his fourth Gym badge!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The Tower of Terror : After being defeated by Sabrina, Ash realizes that he must catch a Ghost-type Pokémon to defeat the Saffron Gym Leader’s awesome Psychic-type Pokémon. He heads for Pokémon Tower in Lavender Town, where they are said to dwell.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Haunter vs. Kadabra : Leaving Pokémon Tower with Haunter in tow, Ash returns to Saffron City with only one goal in mind: to win a Gym Badge from the powerful Psychic-type Gym Leader, Sabrina!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Primeape Goes Bananas : When Ash tries to catch a wild Monkey, it loses its cool and uses Thrash on the whole gang—even stealing Ash’s hat! Will Ash find a way to pacify this pugnacious Pokémon?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Pokémon Scent-Sation! : After insulting Gym Leader Erika’s perfume at a department store, Ash must go to some outrageous lengths to even set foot in the Celadon Gym, let alone be deemed worthy to challenge her!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Hypno's Naptime : Officer Jenny reveals that a mysterious sleep wave has been detected in the area for several days. Our heroes suspect this has something to do with why so many children have gone missing, and why the Pokémon at the Pokémon Center aren't getting better.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Pokémon Fashion Flash : At Brock’s persistent request, our heroes stop by a well-known place to Pokémon breeders for its Pokémon beauty salons.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The Punchy Pokémon : Outside Fuchsia City, our heroes come across Hitmonchan, a Fighting-type Pokémon. With little thought, Ash attempts to battle it, but he and Pikachu are quickly defeated. But who is the mysterious Trainer of this extraordinary Hitmonchan?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Sparks Fly for Magnemite : When a blackout plunges Gringey City into darkness, Ash and friends go to investigate the nearby power plant, where they find Magnemite and a host of Grimer. Could they be responsible for the city’s power outage?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Dig Those Diglett! : Ash, Brock, Misty, and Pikachu are lost deep in the mountains. As they press on through a rough track that doesn’t show up on their map, they suddenly hear a large explosion!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The Ninja Poké-Showdown : On his way to the next Gym Battle challenge, Ash, and his friends arrive at a massive mansion that seems to be a hidden ninjas' lair, appearing lost. Could this be the Fuchsia Gym?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The Flame Pokémon-athon! : In the place of the injured Lara, can Ash handle her fiery Ponyta and guide it to win the annual race?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The Kangaskhan Kid : Our heroes accompany Officer Jenny into the forest, intent on pursuing some poachers. Soon, they discover a young boy amidst a pack of Kangaskhan. His name is Tommy, and no one knows the secret of his childhood…

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The Bridge Bike Gang : After they encounter a very long bridge that can be only crossed by bike, a job delivering medicine is just the ticket for Ash and friends to reach Sunnytown!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ditto’s Mysterious Mansion : Caught in a sudden rain shower, our heroes quickly try to seek some shelter. Dragging a very reluctant Misty, Ash, and Brock go inside a cabin, and instantly get the impression that they are not alone!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Pikachu’s Goodbye : The gang discovers a large group of wild Pikachu, and though they first seem frightened by the intruder, the group eventually opens up to Ash’s Pikachu. How will Pikachu feel seeing others of its kind in the wild?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The Battling Eevee Brothers : Ash and his friends find a large home with a lavish garden party in full swing, attended by the Trainers of Pokémon who evolve using Evolution stones. Maybe they can see the seemingly abandoned Eevee’s Trainer here?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Wake up Snorlax! : Our hungry heroes arrive at a small village. In return for a meal, Ash, Misty, and Brock agree to investigate what is causing the river to dry up, destroying the village’s harvest.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: All Metal Mustang : Nikkos wants a spectacular 1968 Mustang Fastback resto-mod. The all-metal masterpiece catches the eye of someone who wants it at any cost. Jim and Arlene want to enjoy their 45th anniversary in the same 1969 Firebird they rode in on their wedding day.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Throwing Heat : Kansas City Royals pitcher Tim Collins wants a ‘super-fast’ 1968 Mustang, but Dan has to first undo a nightmare combination of bad repairs and unsafe systems. Bob needs a FantomWorks reality check to get his beloved 1950 Willy’s Jeep back on the road.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Damaged Goods : Bo put his 1970 Corvette into storage thirty years ago. Dan discovers that the car needs repair of decades old vandalism. Steve’s 1964 GTO was smashed in an accident. Dan agrees to try and bring his mangled GTO back from beyond the grave.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Now You See It : Jerry shows up with a car in pieces, a U-Haul full of parts and a dream of a perfect Plymouth Business Coupe that desperately needs Dan’s help. Bill asks Dan to find him a 1972 Gran Sport and to restore it with hard-to-find features.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Thunder Time : Ian wants a 1956 ‘baby bird’ restomod that drives like a sports car. Dan’s solution – a GTO-Thunderbird combo that drives like a bat out of hell. Doc Pellerin’s 1937 Volvo was a regular winner at Concours car shows – until a shelf fell on the car…

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Cold Day in Hell : When George brings his beloved 1971 Mustang Mach 1 in for a few repairs, Dan realizes that his car has been jumped. Mick hired a shop to restore his 1952 Mercury Woody. The shop went bust, so FantomWorks is challenged to pick up the pieces. Literally.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Why Am I Blue? : A man arrives in the ER with blue skin and the doctor has no idea what's causing it; a teenage girl has abdominal pains that doctors have been unable to diagnose for years; and a doctor struggles to save the life of the only survivor of a plane crash.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Drama Mama : The real reason behind a teenager's bulging tummy and stomach pains shocks nurses, doctors, and even her meddling Mom; a delirious man yelling for his "car", reveals clues about his own attempted murder; and a college coed mysteriously stops breathing.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Clueless! : A man comes to the ER thinking he's constipated, but his condition is life-threatening, a doctor treating a young woman in cardiac arrest discovers she's treating two patients in one; and patient's family is clueless and a doctor could use some help.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Drunk & Drunker : Two patients arrive at the ER with bizarre fishing injuries; a martial arts instructor suffers abdominal pains that quickly turn into a deadly diagnosis; when teenage victims of a car crash fill his small ER, a doctor must make critical decisions.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Don't Touch That : An ER doctor is trying to solve why a student is having difficulty breathing, and what his fraternity brothers might be hiding; a man falls off a roof and is impaled by a shovel; a police officer has a heart attack that endangers the hospital staff.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Over-Juiced : A geriatric playboy comes into the ER with a minor injury that quickly turns deadly; a health fanatic's juice diet leaves him in a comatose state; doctors juggling multiple critical patients nearly misdiagnose one who has suddenly deteriorated.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Dr. Bikini : A resort doctor must treat a man critically injured by a boat propeller; a discharged patient sets off a deadly chain of events by getting a ride from his designated driver; the ER comes to a standstill when the computers and the head nurse are down.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Don't Push It : Three emergency deliveries in the ER cause a turf war with the labor and delivery department; two gunshot victims have a surprising connection; an unidentified jogger goes into a coma and the ER staff becomes detectives trying to find the woman's family.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Twist & Shout : A newlywed's hand gets stuck in a kitchen appliance and a college student is tormented by an injury down under; a heavy drinker is now sober and experiencing life-threatening complications; and a woman appears to only have blood flow to half of her brain.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Cooking With Grains : Kamut and roasted vegetables; mixed grain pilaf with chicken; herbed barley salad with dates.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Vegetables : Simple vegetable side dishes include steamed spinach, sauteed broccoli rabe, roasted cauliflower steaks, brown sugar-glazed carrots, sauteed sugar snap peas and shelled peas with mint and lemony kale salad.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Holiday Breads : Italian panettone with dried fruit and almonds; German stollen with dried fruit and marzipan; Greek Orthodox Easter bread embellished with bright red eggs.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Nuts : Traditional linzertorte; oatmeal cookies with a peanut butter filling; walnut cake; pecan tart.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Fruit Desserts : Pink applesauce-filled tart; pistachio brown butter cake with Concord grapes; pear frangipane tart; individual apple pies.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Phyllo : Ruffled milk pie; Moroccan meat pie; baklava; spanakopita.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Southern : Banana cream pie; coconut cake; spoon bread; pecan tassies.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Bake It Dark : Sticky toffee pudding with toffee sauce; mini apricot tarte tatins; simple pear tart; no-knead bread with flavorful seeds.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Extraordinary Fruits : Souffle with passion fruit; mango upside-down cake; biscuit-topped raspberry-rhubarb cobblers.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast : One of Martha's favorite things to do is to make jam with the perfectly ripened fruit and berries grown on her Bedford farm; Martha shares her favorite recipes, as well as jam and jarring techniques.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: How to Properly Cook an Egg : Meet Martha in one of her favorite places on the farm - the chicken coop to talk about one of her favorite things to eat - eggs; Martha will share her top methods for making an egg-cellent breakfast.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Pasta Night : Tonight is pasta night in Bedford; Martha and friends make three pasta dishes, including a recipe from her new restaurant, The Bedford, a no-knife spaghetti, and a lemon angel hair pasta.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Shellfish : Martha takes shellfish to the next level with sustainable oysters, baked stuffed clams and more.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: A Classic French Dish: Pot Au Feu : Martha prepares pot-au-feu, a hearty french dish of root vegetables and various cuts of meat, all braised in a savory broth; It's served with sliced meat, vegetables and delicious accompaniments!

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Vietnamese Cuisine : Martha creates an incredible Vietnamese feast with her friend Monica Tran, including lettuce-wrapped golden fried spring rolls, traditional pho soup, and savory sizzling pancakes.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Sweet and Savory Apple Dishes : Martha makes homemade apple cider, a tender pork roast with apples and braised red cabbage; and of course, we can't have an apple show without dessert.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Perfect Chicken Dinner : Martha serves up a delicious chicken dinner with fresh ingredients from her greenhouse; joined by her good friend Kevin Sharkey, they celebrate the perfect meal for a taste of home-cooked goodness.

programme.title: Martha Stewart Living
programme.desc: Stain Removal; Washing a Sweater : Antique pressing irons; organizing a laundry room; restore life of sweaters; stain removal; flower arrangements.

programme.title: Martha Stewart Living
programme.desc: Vermont (Field Trip): Ice Fishing; Maple Sugar Candy : Ice fishing; figure skating; cold survival skills; all about chinchillas with Marc Morrone.

programme.title: Martha Stewart Living
programme.desc: 100th Issue of Martha Stewart Living : Collection of textiles; recipe for lemon chicken, herb salad with feta cheese; making a wooden plant stand.

programme.title: Martha Stewart Living
programme.desc: St Patrick's Day: Boiled Dinner; Irish Soda Bread : St. Patrick's Day recipes for corned beef with cabbage and Irish soda bread; Irish thatcher William Cahill; container planting.

programme.title: Monster Garage
programme.desc: Delivery Truck : The team designs the ultimate, tricked-out delivery truck with cannons for shooting packages onto doorsteps.

programme.title: Verminators
programme.desc: Return of the Rat : Jamie returns to a former client to track down one last rat; Miguel and Roman do a roach clean out.

programme.title: Verminators
programme.desc: Hollywood Roaches : A rookie gets a pigeon job; Mike handles a roach job; Joey and the guys track down a family of rats; Mike boards a boat infested with termites.

programme.title: Pitchmen
programme.desc: From the Jaws of Victory : Billy and Sully shoot a hands-free cellphone spot; shark repellent.

programme.title: Pitchmen
programme.desc: Grater Education : Billy and Sully do a spot for a former pitchman and cancer survivor; Billy engages in the deadliest pitch of his career; Billy and Sully are invited to lecture at Princeton University.

programme.title: Pitchmen
programme.desc: Digging for Dollars : Billy revamps the ad for one of his most successful products, "The Awesome Auger."

programme.title: Pitchmen
programme.desc: Crunch Time : A revolutionary new windshield wiper; "Bug Bazooka"; "EZ Crunch Bowl."

programme.title: Monster Nation
programme.desc: Monster Nation : Draco the Dragonator; a Big Rig Truck Show.

programme.title: Monster Nation
programme.desc: Monster Nation : Top fuel Harley drag racing; a Midwest tree house.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Utopia? : The buyers head to the tiny hamlet of Utopia; Roy has a pocket full of cash and he's not afraid to bribe; Ursula runs afoul of some fowl.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Three Kennys Are Worse Than None : Paul and Bogart arrive at an auction in Brampton with a "secret weapon."

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Instigator in Training : Roy shows his nephew what being an instigator is all about at an auction in South Etobicoke.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Goji, Bogie and the Yogi : Bogart looks to spread the word on the revitalizing powers of goji berry at a Milton auction; Roy seeks to spread peace, joy and distraction.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Ruger Arms: Part 1 : The origin story of one of the America's most successful firearm manufacturers.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Ruger Arms: Part 2 : The modern-era story of one of America's most successful firearm manufacturers.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Yellowstone Bourbon : Seventh generation, Stephen Beam, stewards the Beam family legacy of bourbon in the heart of Kentucky through a traditional distilling process.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Patriot Ordnance Factory : After tragedy strikes, Cody DeSomma fights to carry forward the legacy of an industry legend.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: Hornady : Steve and Jason Hornady work to carry on Joyce Hornady's founding principle in 1949: the world needs a more accurate, deadly, and dependable bullet.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Axel and Chains : When Wardens respond to a call sometimes getting there is most of the battle.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: In the Drink : Montana Game Wardens deal with water issues including littering, under age drinking and the annual Yellowstone Boat Float.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Night Chase : Wardens catch one guy in a web of lies at a check station.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Wasted Dummy : Warden Lesofski looks for those who left elk to rot. Region 2 Wardens get into a situation dealing with their decoy being shot.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: The World Turns All Around Her : The crew must travel through the Route of Ages to confront the Abyss.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Exalted Reason, Resplendent Daughter : The crew searches for a princess abducted by a ruthless pirate. As usual, nothing is as it seems. Along the way, a secret from Beka's past is revealed.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Machinery of the Mind : Harper attends a conference of the Commonwealth's greatest minds. Unfortunately, a mysterious assassin has plans for that collected brilliance. Meanwhile, Dylan is being escorted to meet with Tri-Lorn.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: The Spider's Strategem : The crew encounters a cargo ship with one hundred life forms in a secret hold, and bio-armor on board.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: The torment, The Release : Tri-Lorn demands Dylan to submit himself for trial to turn over Rhade in order to avoid civil war.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Lost In a Space That Isn't There : After being repeatedly attacked by bounty hunters after several evasive slipstream jumps, Dylan determines that there must be a mole on board.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: The Warmth Of An Invisible Light : Harper's experiment on an unfinished cloaking device goes awry, and Dylan ends up in an alternate reality.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: The Others : The crew rescues two people from a spaceship - leaders of opposing sides in a long civil war on a nearby planet. The two warring sides have built an immense wall separating the northern and southern halves of the planet.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Trusting the Gordian Maze : While the Andromeda is confronted by the Commonwealth fleet and Tri-Jema, Dylan must decide whether or not he can entrust the Route of Ages to them, being tempted by a beautiful Commonwealth spy.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Fear Burns Down To Ashes : The Collectors have been using a drug to modify people's behavior, discovering their fears in efforts to control or break them. This is their solution for dealing with Dylan.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: A Symmetry of Imperfection : Rommie's emotions cause one of Harpers fail-safes to cut in, cutting her off from her core AI and shutting down all the ship's systems.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Abridging the Devil's Divide : While on a mission on the Eureka Maru, Dylan, Rhade and Harper are captured by the Templars.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Time Out of Mind : The death of a man named Weslow, from Beka's past, sends the crew in search of an archive that can let Beka relive some of her childhood experiences so that she may make sense of Weslow's dying words.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: The Dissonant Interval Pt. 1 : The Andromeda encounters the Arkology, a society that they believe is the closest to perfection humanity will ever achieve.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: The Dissonant Interval Pt. 2 : Beka decides to leave the crew to fight for themselves. Trance tells them that they will never be as they are again. The Magog Worldship finally re-encounters the Andromeda after two years.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: The Weight Pt. 1 : Upon discovering the truth of planet Seefra-1, Dylan must free its people and reunite his crew.

programme.desc: A New Squad! Two People and a Dog?! : Raijin and Fujin possess superhuman strength, and Naruto is no match for them.

programme.desc: A New Formation: Ino–Shika–Chō! : Shikamaru, Ino and Choji come to the rescue. The three have been sent by Tsunade to assist, allowing Naruto and Pakkun to go after Mizuki.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Remaining Ambition: Orochimaru's Shadow : Naruto discovers that Tsubaki is Mizuki’s fiancée. She has an idea of his whereabouts and asks the squad to take her with them.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: A Clash of Fate: You Can't Bring Me Down! : Naruto and Iruka are left in a daze by the power of Mizuki’s chakra. Naruto counters with a Jutsu but is quickly rebuffed.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Search for the Rare Bikōchū Beetle : Kiba, Shino and Hinata have come up with an idea to use the Bikochu beetle to find Sasuke.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: What's the Difference? Don't All Insects Look Alike? : Squad 8 and Naruto arrive at the Bikochu’s habitat. They use a photograph to guide them in their search…

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: A Battle of Bugs! The Deceivers and the Deceived! : Hinata is kidnapped by Suzumebachi and others from the Kamizuru Clan.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Blaze Away, Byakugan! This is My Ninja Way!! : Naruto, Kiba and Shino are pursued and find themselves cornered in the hive of a queen bee.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: Funeral March for the Living : While training in the Hidden Leaf Village, Naruto rescues three men from the rapids who have come to request a mission.

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: A Lesson Learned! The Iron First of Love! : The Kurosuki gang captures Rokusuke, and Raiga tells him that he will hold a funeral for him!

programme.title: Naruto
programme.desc: The Enemy of Byakugan : Raiga and Ranmaru use their Hidden Mist Jutsu to conceal themselves in Katabami Gold Mine, where even Neji’s Byakugan cannot detect them.

programme.title: Comedy Legends from The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Ep. 20: Joan Rivers, Stiller and Meara, Alan King, Jack Benny, Nipsey Russell : Joan Rivers' "Problems With Fat Childhood, Marriage, Career"; Stiller and Meara's "Satire of a German Commercial, A Woman Buying a Doll"; Alan King's "Wife"; Jack Benny's "Rehearsing with Ed"; Nipsey Russell's "Slender Girlfriend"

programme.title: Comedy Legends from The Ed Sullivan Show
programme.desc: Ep. 2: London Lee, Alan King, Irwin C. Watson, Jean Carroll : London Lee's "Dating"; Alan King's "Kids Getting a Dog"; Irwin C. Watson's "Wife and Heart"; Jean Carroll's "Mother's Day"

programme.title: Ed Sullivan's Rock 'N' Roll Classics

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: Hollywood Icons Of The '60s - Walter Matthau (7/22/86) : We’re spelling tonight! Walter Matthau and Johnny quiz one another on difficult words. Matthau recalls filming Tunisia and shows a clip from his movie, Pirates.

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: The Johnny Carson Show: Comic Legends Of The '50s - Bob Hope (1/11/91) : Merry Christmas, Mr. Hope! Bob says he’s spending the holiday with his grandkids in Reno. Producer Gil Cates spills the beans on celebrity game show, What’s My Line?

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show

programme.title: The Best of the Carol Burnett Show

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: South Korea : After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Miami : In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Madagascar : In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Budapest : For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: New Jersey : In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Hawaii : Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Beirut : The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Burma : With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Los Angeles : Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Colombia : Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Libya : Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Canada : The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tangier : Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Peru : Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Congo : Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Spain : Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: New Mexico : New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Redux II : Mulder receives key information that could mean life or death for Scully.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Unusual Suspects : In a flashback, the Lone Gunmen meet and join forces with Mulder.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Detour : The agents investigate when several people disappear in a remote region of Florida.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: The Post-Modern Prometheus : The agents uncover a genetic experiment that has spun out of control.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Christmas Carol : A mysterious phone call leads Scully to investigate a woman’s suicide.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Emily : Scully and Mulder search for a cure to Emily’s illness.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Kitsunegari : Mulder and Scully hunt a criminal with powerful mind-control capabilities.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Schizogeny : Mysterious trees become the prime suspect of unexplained deaths.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Chinga : Residents of a seacoast town in Maine are terrorized by a little girl and her doll.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Kill Switch : A sentient computer program targets its creators for extinction.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Bad Blood : The agents uncover a cult of vampires residing in a small Texas town.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Patient X : A group of alien abductees is buried alive by faceless assailants.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: The Red and the Black : The agents find more evidence of the planned alien colonization of Earth.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Travelers : A man shot by a police officer may have a connection to Mulder’s father.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Schizogeny : Mysterious trees become the prime suspect of unexplained deaths.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: I, Tonya : In 1991, talented figure skater Tonya Harding becomes the first American woman to complete a triple axel during a competition. In 1994, her world comes crashing down when her ex-husband conspires to injure fellow Olympic hopeful Nancy Kerrigan.

programme.title: All Creatures Here Below
programme.desc: All Creatures Here Below : Desperate for money, Gensan and Ruby impulsively commit a crime which sets in motion a series of dire events. Now on the run, the couple seek refuge in Kansas City, Mo., a place filled with dark secrets that still haunt them.

programme.title: Puncture
programme.desc: Puncture : A lawyer who is a drug addict fights a medical-supplies corporation in court while battling his personal demons.

programme.title: The Lighthouse
programme.desc: The Lighthouse : Two lighthouse keepers try to maintain their sanity while living on a remote and mysterious New England island in the 1890s.

programme.title: Aftershock
programme.desc: Aftershock : Mayhem and death follow when an earthquake traps a group of tourists (Eli Roth, Andrea Osvárt) in a Chilean town.

programme.title: Careful What You Wish For
programme.desc: Careful What You Wish For : Complications arise when a young man (Nick Jonas) has an affair with the seductive wife (Isabel Lucas) of an investment banker (Dermot Mulroney).

programme.title: Day of the Dead: Bloodline
programme.desc: Day of the Dead: Bloodline : A small group of military personnel and some survivalists dwell in an underground bunker as they seek to find a cure in a world overrun by zombies.

programme.title: The Forger
programme.desc: The Forger : Joshua and his drugged-out mother wander into Carmel, Calif., and he quickly gets into trouble. A successful artist takes him in after his mother abandons him, and plans to use Joshua's artistic talents to forge artwork.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Cloud : The crew discovers that a nebula is not what it seems, and Paris invites his fellow officers to share a little "R&R" in his holodeck program.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Eye Of The Needle : The discovery of a wormhole in deep space raises the crew's hopes of finding a shortcut home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Ex Post Facto : After Paris is convicted of a murder he swears he didn't commit, Tuvok must play detective to clear him.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Caretaker, Part 1 : While searching for a missing officer, Captain Kathryn Janeway and the crew of the Starship Voyager are swept 70,000 light years from home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Caretaker, Part 2 : The Voyager crew launches a daring rescue mission to save two officers trapped in a subterranean city facing disaster.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Parallax : Tensions rise between the merged Starfleet and Maquis crews when the ship becomes trapped inside a star that's collapsed upon itself.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Time And Again : When Paris and Janeway are sent back in time, they must decide whether to violate the Prime Directive by warning residents of a planet facing annihilation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Phage : Neelix faces certain death when an alien race stricken by a devastating plague "harvests" his lungs.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Family Man : After a senator's daughter is kidnapped and held for ransom, the FBI must find the little girl before their time limit expires; they must dig into the senator's past for clues to who did this to his family.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Cops and Robbers : Maggie and OA hunt down a ruthless group of robbers who are posing as police officers to target armored trucks.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: Greek Tragedy : When two sorority sisters are found stabbed to death, the Fugitive Task Force heads to Virginia to hunt down the suspect before more killings occur. Hana agrees to meet with Ethan after he asks her for help with his latest troubles.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: 100% : While helping Ethan seek treatment at a VA Hospital, Hana puts out an SOS to the Fugitive Task Force when she is among those taken hostage by an enraged veteran.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: Four Bodies : A string of late-night murders with the same M.O. sends the Fugitive Task Force on a hunt for a serial killer with ties to a radical feminist group. Meanwhile, Nina's sister asks her for a big favor, causing a strain on Scola and Nina's relationship.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Black Penguin : The Fly Team and Jaeger head to Berlin when the 19-year-old son of an American billionaire is found unresponsive in his apartment. As the team works to determine if foul play was involved, they realize there's a shadowy group on the case as well.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Crestfallen : When a private jet carrying American citizens is shot down over Europe, the Fly Team looks into the man who missed the flight. Also, Forrester is conflicted when he receives information on a case from his mother, Angela, on the first season finale.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Unburdened : The Fly Team and new Europol liaison Megan "Smitty" Garretson investigate when an American police detective on the Federal task force is murdered in Paris.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Doomsday : Maggie and OA investigate the death of a safety inspector and its possible connection to a leak at a nuclear power plant.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Family Man : After a senator's daughter is kidnapped and held for ransom, the FBI must find the little girl before their time limit expires; they must dig into the senator's past for clues to who did this to his family.

programme.desc: Crestfallen : When a private jet carrying American citizens is shot down over Europe, the Fly Team looks into the man who missed the flight. Also, Forrester is conflicted when he receives information on a case from his mother, Angela, on the first season finale.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Heroes (Part 2) : Assigned the task of capturing the importance of the Stargate program, a documentary crew is given a true look at the heroic nature and family-like bond of the soldiers of Stargate Command, when a key member of the SGC is killed in action.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Resurrection : SG-1 is sent to investigate the murder of a group of rogue NID scientists. They discover that results of the scientists' experiments may have combined DNA to create the ultimate evil: a human being that possesses the conscience of a Goa'uld.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Pain : Members of the crew begin experiencing disturbingly realistic hallucinations. With the hallucinations spreading to other members of the crew, Dr. Johansen (Alaina Huffman) must track down whatever is causing the episodes before someone dies.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Subversion : After Dr. Rush has a disturbing dream, he suspects that Telford may be a spy for the Lucian Alliance. Rush confides in Col. Young who suspects there may have been residual memory overlap during the doctor’s switch with Colonel Telford days before.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Incursion (Part 1) : When Col. Telford reveals the Destiny is in imminent danger of being boarded by the Lucian Alliance, they launch an attack on the Lucian Alliance’s secret base. Meanwhile, the Lucian Alliance forces Dr. Rush to help stage an assault on the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Incursion (Part 2) : The Destiny crew must fight for their lives when members of the Lucian Alliance come through the Stargate, hell-bent on taking the ship by force. Meanwhile, the Destiny starts having ship-wide power blackouts caused by deadly bursts of radiation.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Intervention : After Colonel Young and his military personnel are captured by the Lucian Alliance, Dannic abandons them on a nearby planet. Meanwhile on the ship, Dr. Rush, Brody, Chloe, and Eli attempt a risky plan to force the Lucians to surrender.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Chimera : Daniel experiences strange dreams centered around his possible knowledge of the Lost City of the Ancients. Suspicious that Daniel's mind is being manipulated, the team must find a way to help him while keeping the secret from the Goa'uld.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Death Knell : Carter flees from a super warrior with a piece of technology that may be the key to defeating Anubis's new army. Injured and unarmed, Carter must use all her training to stay alive, while O'Neill and Teal'c race to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Heroes (Part 1) : When the Air Force sends a documentary crew to capture the historical importance of the Stargate program, the members of the SGC are resistant. Tensions rise when an emergency forces General Hammond to restrict the access they're given to the SGC.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Heroes (Part 2) : Assigned the task of capturing the importance of the Stargate program, a documentary crew is given a true look at the heroic nature and family-like bond of the soldiers of Stargate Command, when a key member of the SGC is killed in action.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Resurrection : SG-1 is sent to investigate the murder of a group of rogue NID scientists. They discover that results of the scientists' experiments may have combined DNA to create the ultimate evil: a human being that possesses the conscience of a Goa'uld.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Subversion : After Dr. Rush has a disturbing dream, he suspects that Telford may be a spy for the Lucian Alliance. Rush confides in Col. Young who suspects there may have been residual memory overlap during the doctor’s switch with Colonel Telford days before.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Incursion (Part 1) : When Col. Telford reveals the Destiny is in imminent danger of being boarded by the Lucian Alliance, they launch an attack on the Lucian Alliance’s secret base. Meanwhile, the Lucian Alliance forces Dr. Rush to help stage an assault on the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Incursion (Part 2) : The Destiny crew must fight for their lives when members of the Lucian Alliance come through the Stargate, hell-bent on taking the ship by force. Meanwhile, the Destiny starts having ship-wide power blackouts caused by deadly bursts of radiation.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Intervention : After Colonel Young and his military personnel are captured by the Lucian Alliance, Dannic abandons them on a nearby planet. Meanwhile on the ship, Dr. Rush, Brody, Chloe, and Eli attempt a risky plan to force the Lucians to surrender.

channel.display-name: Puto TV Classic TV Crime Drama

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Last Round : Chief Forbes starts a boxing program in Sparta to help young men at risk and has taken a special interest in one kid with a lot of promise, Kevin Brooks; however, Forbes soon discovers that Kevin is involved in a series of burglaries in town.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Ches And The Grand Lady : Lieutenant Lonnie Jamison’s wealthy aunt, Cordelia Woodlin, is back in Sparta and spending time with her very old and dear friend, blues singer Ches Collins; that is until Ches starts receiving racist death threats warning him to stay away from her.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Conspiracy Of One : Soon after Virgil Tibbs is hired by a local law firm, a pair of wealthy clients, the Bookers, are in a car accident; Chuck Booker survives, but Abby is killed. Chuck claims he was dodging a deer, but Tibbs suspects that Abby’s death was no accident.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Rabbi : A new synagogue in Sparta is plagued by vandalism, but when the temple is destroyed and the sacred Torah is stolen, Rabbi Feldman refuses Sheriff Gillespie’s help based on a decades-old anti-Semitic crime that Gillespie apparently helped cover up.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Hard Choices : While trying to keep his buddy Justin out of trouble, Eugene Glendon jeopardizes his probation when he is seen leaving the scene of a robbery at a local gas station. Meanwhile, Eugene insists his mother Harriet choose between him and Bill Gillespie.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Time's Long Shadow : Wealthy landowner Frank Davenport is developing a large tract of his property into an expensive residential community. When a number of old slave artifacts are discovered at his construction site, it triggers a chain of events that ends in murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Poor Relations : Much to the dismay of Parker Williams, his wayward stepfather, Daddy Roy Eversole, returns to Sparta with his current girlfriend, Roda, and moves into Parker’s home. Even worse, they’re being pursued by a pair of desperate art thieves from Florida.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Dangerous Engagement : On the eve of his wedding to Harriet De Long, Sheriff Bill Gillespie is stalked by a vengeance-seeking killer in a case of mistaken identity when a newspaper accidentally uses a photo of Gillespie in a story about the previous sheriff, Will McComb.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: You Call This Plain Clothes? : After a series of murders take place involving prostitutes, Cagney (Meg Foster) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) go undercover in the hopes of finding who keeps killing the women. Also starring Al Waxman, Carl Lumbly, and John Karlen.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Pop Used To Work In Chinatown : A Chinatown robbery brings Cagney's retired father back on the beat to show his daughter how to properly conduct an investigation. Guest starring Dick O'Neill as Charlie Cagney. Tyne Daly, Meg Foster, Al Waxman, and Carl Lumbly star.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Beyond The Golden Door : In the hopes of finding a missing child, Cagney (Meg Foster) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) go undercover as workers in the garment industry and end up helping an undocumented worker from Guatemala find her sister's murderer.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Suffer The Children : Cagney (Meg Foster) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) become involved in an investigation of child abuse and possible murder when they rescue a four-year-old child from a window ledge. Also starring Al Waxman, Carl Lumbly, and John Karlen.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Better Than Equal : Cagney (Meg Foster) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) must ignore their feminist sentiments when they are assigned to protect the life of ERA critic, Helen Granger (guest star Julie Adams), who is being harassed by a caller who is threatening her life.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Street Scene : After an elderly man (guest star George Petrie) is involved with the death of a gang member, Cagney and Lacey are accused of racial prejudice as they investigate what happened. The truth is finally revealed with the help of the victim's brother.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Witness To An Incident : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) both have differing recollections when it comes to the events surrounding a young officer fatally shooting a civilian. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels and Carl Lumbly as Mark Petrie.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cheating Game : In this sequel to "The Waiting Game", Laura resents Adam's advice on how she ought to be running her ranch. A newcomer, Ward Bannister, comes to her aid, but is actually part of a scheme to steal her ranch.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Pure Truth : Hoss is suffering from spring fever, goes to the wrong town and is accused of bank robbery.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Companeros : Mateo Ibara and his wife Carla visit the Ponderosa. Ibara asks Will to return to Mexico with him. Ibara and Will fought together for Juarez's cause and Ibara saved Will's life.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: My Son, My Son : Ben's plans to marry Katherine Saunders are upset when her son Eden is accused of killing his former girlfriend.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Alias Joe Cartwright : A man who looks similar to Joe uses Joe's name and gets Joe in the position of facing the firing squad.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Gentleman from New Orleans : The new stranger in town claims to be the famous pirate Jean Lafitte, and Hoss believes him.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Bullet for a Bride : While out hunting for a mountain lion, Joe accidentally shots Tessa Caldwell causing her to go blind. As a result of his guilt, Joe ends up proposing to the girl.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss and the Leprechauns : In what is arguably the best comedy of the series, Hoss swears he has seen green elves running around the Ponderosa and a smooth-talking Irishman complicates matters even worse.
